```text
   204→  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
   205→    e.preventDefault();
   206→
   207→    if (!validateForm()) {
   208→      return;
   209→    }
   210→
   211→    try {
   212→      setSubmitting(true);
   213→
   214→      // Upload files to Supabase Storage
   215→      const responseDataWithFiles = { ...formData };
   216→
   217→      // Add Yes/No reasons to response data
   218→      for (const fieldId in yesNoReasons) {
   219→        if (yesNoReasons[fieldId]) {
   220→          responseDataWithFiles[`${fieldId}_reason`] = yesNoReasons[fieldId];
   221→        }
   222→      }
   223→
   224→      for (const fieldId in uploadedFiles) {
   225→        if (uploadedFiles[fieldId] && uploadedFiles[fieldId].length > 0) {
   226→          const fileUrls: string[] = [];
   227→
   228→          for (const file of uploadedFiles[fieldId]) {
   229→            const fileExt = file.name.split('.').pop();
   230→            const fileName = `${form!.id}/${fieldId}/${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(7)}.${fileExt}`;
   231→
   232→            const { data, error } = await supabasePublic.storage
   233→              .from('form-attachments')
   234→              .upload(fileName, file);
   235→
   236→            if (error) {
   237→              console.error('Error uploading file:', error);
   238→              throw new Error(`Failed to upload ${file.name}`);
   239→            }
   240→
   241→            // Get public URL
   242→            const { data: urlData } = supabasePublic.storage
   243→              .from('form-attachments')
   244→              .getPublicUrl(fileName);
   245→
   246→            fileUrls.push(urlData.publicUrl);
   247→          }
   248→
   249→          // Store file URLs in response data
   250→          responseDataWithFiles[`${fieldId}_attachments`] = fileUrls;
   251→        }
   252→      }
   253→
   254→      await FormService.submitResponse(
   255→        {
   256→          form_id: form!.id,
   257→          response_data: responseDataWithFiles,
   258→        },
   259→        supabasePublic
   260→      );
   261→
   262→      // If thank you page is enabled, navigate to last page instead of showing full-page success
   263→      if (form?.enable_thank_you_page) {
   264→        setCurrentPage(totalPages);
   265→      }
   266→      setSubmitted(true);
   267→    } catch (error) {
   268→      console.error('Error submitting form:', error);
   269→      setError('Failed to submit form. Please try again.');
   270→    } finally {
   271→      setSubmitting(false);
   272→    }
   273→  };
   274→
   275→  const handleFieldChange = (fieldId: string, value: any) => {
   276→    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [fieldId]: value }));
   277→    // Clear validation error when user starts typing
   278→    if (validationErrors[fieldId]) {
   279→      setValidationErrors(prev => {
   280→        const newErrors = { ...prev };
   281→        delete newErrors[fieldId];
   282→        return newErrors;
   283→      });
   284→    }
   285→  };
   286→
   287→  const handleCheckboxChange = (fieldId: string, option: string, checked: boolean) => {
   288→    setFormData(prev => {
   289→      const currentValues = prev[fieldId] || [];
   290→      if (checked) {
   291→        return { ...prev, [fieldId]: [...currentValues, option] };
   292→      } else {
   293→        return { ...prev, [fieldId]: currentValues.filter((v: string) => v !== option) };
   294→      }
   295→    });
   296→  };
   297→
   298→  const renderField = (field: any) => {
   299→    const hasError = validationErrors[field.id];
   300→
   301→    switch (field.field_type as FieldType) {
   302→      case 'text':
   303→      case 'email':
   304→      case 'number':
   305→        if (field.allow_multiple) {
   306→          const answers = multipleAnswers[field.id] || [''];
   307→          return (
   308→            <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   309→              <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   310→                <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   311→                {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   312→              </Label>
   313→              {answers.map((answer, index) => (
   314→                <div key={index} className="flex gap-2 items-center">
   315→                  <span className="text-gray-600 font-medium min-w-[24px]">{index + 1}.</span>
   316→                  <Input
   317→                    type={field.field_type}
   318→                    value={answer}
   319→                    onChange={(e) => {
   320→                      const newAnswers = [...answers];
   321→                      newAnswers[index] = e.target.value;
   322→                      setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   323→                      handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   324→                    }}
   325→                    className={`auth-input flex-1 ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   326→                  />
   327→                  {index === answers.length - 1 && (
   328→                    <Button
   329→                      type="button"
   330→                      onClick={() => {
   331→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({
   332→                          ...prev,
   333→                          [field.id]: [...answers, '']
   334→                        }));
   335→                      }}
   336→                      style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   337→                      className="hover:opacity-90"
   338→                    >
   339→                      +
   340→                    </Button>
   341→                  )}
   342→                  {answers.length > 1 && (
   343→                    <Button
   344→                      type="button"
   345→                      variant="outline"
   346→                      onClick={() => {
   347→                        const newAnswers = answers.filter((_, i) => i !== index);
   348→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   349→                        handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   350→                      }}
   351→                      className="hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   352→                    >
   353→                      ×
   354→                    </Button>
   355→                  )}
   356→                </div>
   357→              ))}
   358→              {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   359→            </div>
   360→          );
   361→        }
   362→        return (
   363→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   364→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   365→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   366→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   367→            </Label>
   368→            <Input
   369→              id={field.id}
   370→              type={field.field_type}
   371→              value={formData[field.id] || ''}
   372→              onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange(field.id, e.target.value)}
   373→              className={`auth-input ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   374→            />
   375→            {field.allow_attachments && (
   376→              <div className="space-y-2">
   377→                <div
   378→                  className="border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-6 text-center bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
   379→                  onDragOver={(e) => {
   380→                    e.preventDefault();
   381→                    e.currentTarget.classList.add('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   382→                  }}
   383→                  onDragLeave={(e) => {
   384→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   385→                  }}
   386→                  onDrop={(e) => {
   387→                    e.preventDefault();
   388→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   389→                    const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files);
   390→                    if (files.length > 0) {
   391→                      setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   392→                        ...prev,
   393→                        [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   394→                      }));
   395→                    }
   396→                  }}
   397→                  onClick={() => {
   398→                    const input = document.getElementById(`file-${field.id}`) as HTMLInputElement;
   399→                    input?.click();
   400→                  }}
   401→                >
   402→                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
   403→                    <Upload className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
   404→                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Drag files here or click to upload</p>
   405→                  </div>
   406→                  <Input
   407→                    id={`file-${field.id}`}
   408→                    type="file"
   409→                    multiple
   410→                    onChange={(e) => {
   411→                      const files = Array.from(e.target.files || []);
   412→                      if (files.length > 0) {
   413→                        setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   414→                          ...prev,
   415→                          [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   416→                        }));
   417→                      }
   418→                    }}
   419→                    className="hidden"
   420→                  />
   421→                </div>
   422→                {uploadedFiles[field.id] && uploadedFiles[field.id].length > 0 && (
   423→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   424→                    {uploadedFiles[field.id].map((file, index) => (
   425→                      <div key={index} className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded">
   426→                        <span className="text-gray-700">{file.name}</span>
   427→                        <Button
   428→                          type="button"
   429→                          variant="ghost"
   430→                          size="sm"
   431→                          onClick={() => {
   432→                            setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   433→                              ...prev,
   434→                              [field.id]: prev[field.id].filter((_, i) => i !== index)
   435→                            }));
   436→                          }}
   437→                          className="h-6 w-6 p-0 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   438→                        >
   439→                          ×
   440→                        </Button>
   441→                      </div>
   442→                    ))}
   443→                  </div>
   444→                )}
   445→              </div>
   446→            )}
   447→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   448→          </div>
   449→        );
   450→
   451→      case 'textarea':
   452→        if (field.allow_multiple) {
   453→          const answers = multipleAnswers[field.id] || [''];
   454→          return (
   455→            <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   456→              <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   457→                <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   458→                {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   459→              </Label>
   460→              {answers.map((answer, index) => (
   461→                <div key={index} className="flex gap-2 items-start">
   462→                  <span className="text-gray-600 font-medium min-w-[24px] mt-2">{index + 1}.</span>
   463→                  <Textarea
   464→                    value={answer}
   465→                    onChange={(e) => {
   466→                      const newAnswers = [...answers];
   467→                      newAnswers[index] = e.target.value;
   468→                      setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   469→                      handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   470→                    }}
   471→                    rows={4}
   472→                    className={`auth-input flex-1 ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   473→                  />
   474→                  {index === answers.length - 1 && (
   475→                    <Button
   476→                      type="button"
   477→                      onClick={() => {
   478→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({
   479→                          ...prev,
   480→                          [field.id]: [...answers, '']
   481→                        }));
   482→                      }}
   483→                      style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   484→                      className="hover:opacity-90"
   485→                    >
   486→                      +
   487→                    </Button>
   488→                  )}
   489→                  {answers.length > 1 && (
   490→                    <Button
   491→                      type="button"
   492→                      variant="outline"
   493→                      onClick={() => {
   494→                        const newAnswers = answers.filter((_, i) => i !== index);
   495→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   496→                        handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   497→                      }}
   498→                      className="hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   499→                    >
   500→                      ×
   501→                    </Button>
   502→                  )}
   503→                </div>
   504→              ))}
   505→              {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   506→            </div>
   507→          );
   508→        }
   509→        return (
   510→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   511→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   512→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   513→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   514→            </Label>
   515→            <Textarea
   516→              id={field.id}
   517→              value={formData[field.id] || ''}
   518→              onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange(field.id, e.target.value)}
   519→              rows={4}
   520→              className={`auth-input ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   521→            />
   522→            {field.allow_attachments && (
   523→              <div className="space-y-2">
   524→                <div
   525→                  className="border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-6 text-center bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
   526→                  onDragOver={(e) => {
   527→                    e.preventDefault();
   528→                    e.currentTarget.classList.add('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   529→                  }}
   530→                  onDragLeave={(e) => {
   531→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   532→                  }}
   533→                  onDrop={(e) => {
   534→                    e.preventDefault();
   535→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   536→                    const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files);
   537→                    if (files.length > 0) {
   538→                      setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   539→                        ...prev,
   540→                        [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   541→                      }));
   542→                    }
   543→                  }}
   544→                  onClick={() => {
   545→                    const input = document.getElementById(`file-${field.id}`) as HTMLInputElement;
   546→                    input?.click();
   547→                  }}
   548→                >
   549→                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
   550→                    <Upload className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
   551→                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Drag files here or click to upload</p>
   552→                  </div>
   553→                  <Input
   554→                    id={`file-${field.id}`}
   555→                    type="file"
   556→                    multiple
   557→                    onChange={(e) => {
   558→                      const files = Array.from(e.target.files || []);
   559→                      if (files.length > 0) {
   560→                        setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   561→                          ...prev,
   562→                          [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   563→                        }));
   564→                      }
   565→                    }}
   566→                    className="hidden"
   567→                  />
   568→                </div>
   569→                {uploadedFiles[field.id] && uploadedFiles[field.id].length > 0 && (
   570→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   571→                    {uploadedFiles[field.id].map((file, index) => (
   572→                      <div key={index} className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded">
   573→                        <span className="text-gray-700">{file.name}</span>
   574→                        <Button
   575→                          type="button"
   576→                          variant="ghost"
   577→                          size="sm"
   578→                          onClick={() => {
   579→                            setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   580→                              ...prev,
   581→                              [field.id]: prev[field.id].filter((_, i) => i !== index)
   582→                            }));
   583→                          }}
   584→                          className="h-6 w-6 p-0 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   585→                        >
   586→                          ×
   587→                        </Button>
   588→                      </div>
   589→                    ))}
   590→                  </div>
   591→                )}
   592→              </div>
   593→            )}
   594→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   595→          </div>
   596→        );
   597→
   598→      case 'date':
   599→        return (
   600→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   601→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   602→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   603→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   604→            </Label>
   605→            <Popover>
   606→              <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   607→                <Button
   608→                  variant="outline"
   609→                  className={`auth-input w-full justify-start text-left font-normal ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   610→                  style={{
   611→                    borderColor: hasError ? '#ef4444' : '#e5e7eb',
   612→                    backgroundColor: 'white',
   613→                    color: formData[field.id] ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af'
   614→                  }}
   615→                >
   616→                  <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
   617→                  {formData[field.id] ? formatDate(formData[field.id]) : "Select date"}
   618→                </Button>
   619→              </PopoverTrigger>
   620→              <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
   621→                <Calendar
   622→                  mode="single"
   623→                  selected={parseDateFromInput(formData[field.id])}
   624→                  onSelect={(date) => handleFieldChange(field.id, formatDateForInput(date))}
   625→                  initialFocus
   626→                  classNames={{
   627→                    day_selected: "text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white",
   628→                  }}
   629→                  modifiersStyles={{
   630→                    selected: { backgroundColor: "#3e8692" }
   631→                  }}
   632→                />
   633→              </PopoverContent>
   634→            </Popover>
   635→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   636→          </div>
   637→        );
   638→
   639→      case 'select':
   640→        const selectedValue = otherFieldSelected[field.id] ? '__OTHER__' : (formData[field.id] || '');
   641→        const showYesReason = field.require_yes_reason && selectedValue.toLowerCase() === 'yes';
   642→        const showNoReason = field.require_no_reason && selectedValue.toLowerCase() === 'no';
   643→
   644→        return (
   645→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   646→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   647→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   648→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   649→            </Label>
   650→            <Select
   651→              value={selectedValue}
   652→              onValueChange={(value) => {
   653→                if (value === '__OTHER__') {
   654→                  // Mark that Other is selected
   655→                  setOtherFieldSelected(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: true }));
   656→                  handleFieldChange(field.id, otherFieldValues[field.id] || '');
   657→                } else {
   658→                  // Regular option selected
   659→                  setOtherFieldSelected(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: false }));
   660→                  handleFieldChange(field.id, value);
   661→                  // Clear the other field value
   662→                  setOtherFieldValues(prev => {
   663→                    const newValues = { ...prev };
   664→                    delete newValues[field.id];
   665→                    return newValues;
   666→                  });
   667→
   668→                  // Clear reason if switching away from Yes/No
   669→                  if (value.toLowerCase() !== 'yes' && value.toLowerCase() !== 'no') {
   670→                    setYesNoReasons(prev => {
   671→                      const newReasons = { ...prev };
   672→                      delete newReasons[field.id];
   673→                      return newReasons;
   674→                    });
   675→                  }
   676→                }
   677→              }}
   678→            >
   679→              <SelectTrigger className={`auth-input ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}>
   680→                <SelectValue placeholder="Select an option" />
   681→              </SelectTrigger>
   682→              <SelectContent>
   683→                {field.options?.map((option: string) => (
   684→                  <SelectItem key={option} value={option}>
   685→                    {option}
   686→                  </SelectItem>
   687→                ))}
   688→                {field.include_other && (
   689→                  <SelectItem value="__OTHER__">Other</SelectItem>
   690→                )}
   691→              </SelectContent>
   692→            </Select>
   693→            {otherFieldSelected[field.id] && (
   694→              <Input
   695→                placeholder="Please specify..."
   696→                value={otherFieldValues[field.id] || ''}
   697→                onChange={(e) => {
   698→                  const value = e.target.value;
   699→                  setOtherFieldValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: value }));
   700→                  // Store the actual value in formData
   701→                  handleFieldChange(field.id, value);
   702→                }}
   703→                className="auth-input mt-2"
   704→              />
   705→            )}
   706→            {showYesReason && (
   707→              <div className="mt-2">
   708→                <Textarea
   709→                  id={`${field.id}-yes-reason`}
   710→                  value={yesNoReasons[field.id] || ''}
   711→                  onChange={(e) => {
   712→                    setYesNoReasons(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: e.target.value }));
   713→                  }}
   714→                  className="auth-input"
   715→                  rows={3}
   716→                />
   717→              </div>
   718→            )}
   719→            {showNoReason && (
   720→              <div className="mt-2">
   721→                <Textarea
   722→                  id={`${field.id}-no-reason`}
   723→                  value={yesNoReasons[field.id] || ''}
   724→                  onChange={(e) => {
   725→                    setYesNoReasons(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: e.target.value }));
   726→                  }}
   727→                  className="auth-input"
   728→                  rows={3}
   729→                />
   730→              </div>
   731→            )}
   732→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   733→          </div>
   734→        );
   735→
   736→      case 'radio':
   737→        return (
   738→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   739→            <Label>
   740→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   741→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   742→            </Label>
   743→            <RadioGroup value={formData[field.id] || ''} onValueChange={(value) => handleFieldChange(field.id, value)}>
   744→              <div className="space-y-2">
   745→                {field.options?.map((option: string) => (
   746→                  <div key={option} className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   747→                    <RadioGroupItem value={option} id={`${field.id}-${option}`} />
   748→                    <Label htmlFor={`${field.id}-${option}`} className="font-normal cursor-pointer">
   749→                      {option}
   750→                    </Label>
   751→                  </div>
   752→                ))}
   753→              </div>
   754→            </RadioGroup>
   755→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   756→          </div>
   757→        );
   758→
   759→      case 'checkbox':
   760→        return (
   761→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   762→            <Label>
   763→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   764→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   765→            </Label>
   766→            <div className="space-y-2">
   767→              {field.options?.map((option: string) => (
   768→                <div key={option} className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   769→                  <Checkbox
   770→                    id={`${field.id}-${option}`}
   771→                    checked={formData[field.id]?.includes(option) || false}
   772→                    onCheckedChange={(checked) => handleCheckboxChange(field.id, option, checked as boolean)}
   773→                  />
   774→                  <Label htmlFor={`${field.id}-${option}`} className="font-normal cursor-pointer">
   775→                    {option}
   776→                  </Label>
   777→                </div>
   778→              ))}
   779→              {field.include_other && (
   780→                <>
   781→                  <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   782→                    <Checkbox
   783→                      id={`${field.id}-__OTHER__`}
   784→                      checked={formData[field.id]?.includes('__OTHER__') || false}
   785→                      onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
   786→                        handleCheckboxChange(field.id, '__OTHER__', checked as boolean);
   787→                        if (!checked) {
   788→                          // Clear the other field value when unchecked
   789→                          setOtherFieldValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: '' }));
   790→                        }
   791→                      }}
   792→                    />
   793→                    <Label htmlFor={`${field.id}-__OTHER__`} className="font-normal cursor-pointer">
   794→                      Other
   795→                    </Label>
   796→                  </div>
   797→                  {formData[field.id]?.includes('__OTHER__') && (
   798→                    <Input
   799→                      placeholder="Please specify..."
   800→                      value={otherFieldValues[field.id] || ''}
   801→                      onChange={(e) => setOtherFieldValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: e.target.value }))}
   802→                      className="ml-6"
   803→                    />
   804→                  )}
   805→                </>
   806→              )}
   807→            </div>
   808→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   809→          </div>
   810→        );
   811→
   812→      case 'section':
   813→        return (
   814→          <div key={field.id} className="py-4">
   815→            <div className="font-bold text-gray-900 border-b-2 border-gray-300 pb-2" style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} />
   816→          </div>
   817→        );
   818→
   819→      case 'description':
   820→        return (
   821→          <div key={field.id} className="py-2">
   822→            <div className="text-gray-600" style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} />
   823→          </div>
   824→        );
   825→
   826→      case 'link':
   827→        try {
   828→          const linkUrl = (Array.isArray(field.options) && field.options.length > 0) ? field.options[0] : '';
   829→          const linkTitle = field.label ? String(field.label).replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim() || 'Embedded content' : 'Embedded content';
   830→
   831→          if (!linkUrl) {
   832→            return null;
   833→          }
   834→
   835→          return (
   836→            <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   837→              {field.label && typeof field.label === 'string' && (
   838→                <div className="font-medium text-gray-900" dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   839→              )}
   840→              <div className="w-full border rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-gray-50">
   841→                <iframe
   842→                  src={linkUrl}
   843→                  className="w-full"
   844→                  style={{ height: '600px', border: 'none' }}
   845→                  title={linkTitle}
   846→                  allowFullScreen
   847→                />
   848→              </div>
   849→            </div>
   850→          );
   851→        } catch (error) {
   852→          console.error('Error rendering link field:', error);
   853→          return null;
   854→        }
   855→
   856→      default:
   857→        return null;
   858→    }
   859→  };
   860→
   861→  // Loading state
   862→  if (loading) {
   863→    return (
   864→      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
   865→        <div className="text-center">
   866→          <Loader className="h-12 w-12 animate-spin text-[#3e8692] mx-auto mb-4" />
   867→          <p className="text-gray-600 text-lg font-medium">Loading form...</p>
   868→        </div>
   869→      </div>
   870→    );
   871→  }
   872→
   873→  // Error state
   874→  if (error) {
   875→    return (
   876→      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-6">
   877→        <div className="text-center max-w-md">
   878→          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
   879→            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
   880→          </div>
   881→          <div className="rounded-full bg-red-50 p-4 w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center">
   882→            <FileText className="h-10 w-10 text-red-500" />
   883→          </div>
   884→          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Form Not Available</h2>
   885→          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{error}</p>
   886→        </div>
   887→      </div>
   888→    );
   889→  }
   890→
   891→  // Success state - only show full-page success if thank you page is NOT enabled
   892→  if (submitted && !form?.enable_thank_you_page) {
   893→    return (
   894→      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-6">
   895→        <div className="text-center max-w-md">
   896→          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
   897→            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
   898→          </div>
   899→          <div className="rounded-full bg-green-50 p-4 w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center">
   900→            <CheckCircle2 className="h-10 w-10 text-green-600" />
   901→          </div>
   902→          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Thank you!</h2>
   903→          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">Your response has been submitted successfully.</p>
   904→        </div>
   905→      </div>
   906→    );
   907→  }
   908→
   909→  // Form state
   910→  return (
   911→    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white">
   912→      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-6 py-16">
   913→        {/* Logo and Title */}
   914→        <div className="text-center mb-12">
   915→          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
   916→            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
   917→          </div>
   918→          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">{form?.name}</h1>
   919→          {form?.description && (
   920→            <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed max-w-xl mx-auto">{form.description}</p>
   921→          )}
   922→        </div>
   923→
   924→        {/* Form Content */}
   925→        <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto">
   926→          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-8">
   927→              {/* Page indicator */}
   928→              {totalPages > 1 && (
   929→                <div className="flex justify-center mb-8">
   930→                  <div className="flex gap-2">
   931→                    {Array.from({ length: totalPages }, (_, i) => i + 1).map((pageNum) => (
   932→                      <div
   933→                        key={pageNum}
   934→                        className={`h-2 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 ${
   935→                          pageNum === currentPage
   936→                            ? 'bg-[#3e8692] w-8'
   937→                            : pageNum < currentPage
   938→                            ? 'bg-[#3e8692] opacity-30 w-2'
   939→                            : 'bg-gray-300 w-2'
   940→                        }`}
   941→                      />
   942→                    ))}
   943→                  </div>
   944→                </div>
   945→              )}
   946→
   947→              {/* Form fields for current page */}
   948→              {form?.fields
   949→                .filter(field => field.page_number === currentPage)
   950→                .map(field => renderField(field))}
   951→
   952→              {/* Navigation buttons - hide when on thank you page after submission */}
   953→              {!(form?.enable_thank_you_page && currentPage === totalPages && submitted) && (
   954→                <div className="pt-8 flex gap-4 justify-center items-center">
   955→                  {currentPage > 1 && !submitted && (
   956→                    <Button
   957→                      type="button"
   958→                      onClick={handlePreviousPage}
   959→                      className="px-6 h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg bg-white border border-gray-300 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:border-gray-400 transition-all flex items-center gap-2"
   960→                    >
   961→                      <ChevronLeft className="h-5 w-5" />
   962→                      Previous
   963→                    </Button>
   964→                  )}
   965→                  {/* Show Next button or Submit button based on current page and thank you page setting */}
   966→                  {(form?.enable_thank_you_page && currentPage < totalPages - 1) || (!form?.enable_thank_you_page && currentPage < totalPages) ? (
   967→                    <Button
   968→                      type="button"
   969→                      onClick={handleNextPage}
   970→                      className="px-6 h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg bg-[#3e8692] hover:bg-[#2d6570] text-white transition-all flex items-center gap-2"
   971→                    >
   972→                      Next
   973→                      <ChevronRight className="h-5 w-5" />
   974→                    </Button>
   975→                  ) : !submitted && (
   976→                    <Button
   977→                      type="submit"
   978→                      disabled={submitting}
   979→                      className="px-6 h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg bg-[#3e8692] hover:bg-[#2d6570] text-white transition-all disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
   980→                    >
   981→                      {submitting ? (
   982→                        <>
   983→                          <Loader className="h-5 w-5 animate-spin" />
   984→                          Submitting...
   985→                        </>
   986→                      ) : (
   987→                        <>
   988→                          Submit
   989→                          <ChevronRight className="h-5 w-5" />
   990→                        </>
   991→                      )}
   992→                    </Button>
   993→                  )}
   994→                </div>
   995→              )}
   996→
   997→            </form>
   998→          </div>
   999→        </div>
  1000→      </div>
  1001→  );
  1002→}
  1003→
  1004→
```

```text
   164→  stage?: OpportunityStage;
   165→  dm_account?: DmAccount;
   166→  bucket?: Bucket;
   167→  temperature_score?: number;
   168→  source?: string;
   169→  tg_handle?: string;
   170→  owner_id?: string;
   171→  referrer?: string;
   172→  affiliate_id?: string;
   173→  deal_value?: number;
   174→  currency?: string;
   175→  notes?: string;
   176→  position?: number;
   177→  poc_platform?: PocPlatform;

   182→  opportunity_id: string;
   183→  type: ActivityType;
   184→  title: string;
   185→  description?: string;
   186→  outcome?: string;
   187→  next_step?: string;
   188→  next_step_date?: string;
   189→}
   190→
   191→// ============================================
   192→// Sales Pipeline Service
   193→// ============================================
   194→
   195→export class SalesPipelineService {
   196→  // ----------------------------------------
   197→  // OPPORTUNITIES
   198→  // ----------------------------------------
   199→
   200→  static async getAll(): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]> {
   201→    // Supabase defaults to 1000 rows — paginate to fetch all
   202→    const pageSize = 1000;
   203→    let allData: SalesPipelineOpportunity[] = [];
   204→    let from = 0;
   205→    let hasMore = true;
   206→
   207→    while (hasMore) {
   208→      const { data, error } = await supabase
   209→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   210→        .select(`
   211→          *,
   212→          affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   213→          client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   214→        `)
   215→        .in('stage', ALL_V2_STAGES)
   216→        .order('position', { ascending: true })
   217→        .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
   218→        .range(from, from + pageSize - 1);
   219→
   220→      if (error) {
   221→        console.error('Error fetching sales pipeline opportunities:', error);
   222→        throw error;
   223→      }
   224→
   225→      allData = allData.concat((data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[]);
   226→      hasMore = (data?.length || 0) === pageSize;
   227→      from += pageSize;
   228→    }
   229→
   230→    return allData;
   231→  }
   232→
   233→  static async create(data: CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   234→    // Dedup check: name + tg_handle
   235→    if (data.name && data.tg_handle) {
   236→      const dedupKey = `${data.name.toLowerCase().trim()}::${data.tg_handle.toLowerCase().trim()}`;
   237→      const { data: existing } = await supabase
   238→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   239→        .select('id')
   240→        .eq('dedup_key', dedupKey)
   241→        .maybeSingle();
   242→
   243→      if (existing) {
   244→        throw new Error('A deal with this name and TG handle already exists');
   245→      }
   246→
   247→      (data as any).dedup_key = dedupKey;
   248→    }
   249→
   250→    const insertData = {
   251→      ...data,
   252→      stage: data.stage || 'cold_dm',
   253→    };
   254→
   255→    const { data: created, error } = await supabase
   256→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   257→      .insert([insertData])
   258→      .select()
   259→      .single();
   260→
   261→    if (error) throw error;
   262→
   263→    // Record stage history
   264→    await CRMService.recordStageHistory('opportunity', created.id, null, insertData.stage || 'cold_dm');
   265→
   266→    // Auto-calculate temperature score
   267→    await this.recalcTemperature(created.id);
   268→
   269→    return created as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   270→  }
   271→
   272→  static async update(
   273→    id: string,
   274→    updates: Partial<CreateSalesPipelineOpportunityData> & {
   275→      warm_sub_state?: WarmSubState | null;
   276→      orbit_reason?: OrbitReason | null;
   277→      closed_lost_reason?: string | null;
   278→      next_meeting_at?: string | null;
   279→      next_meeting_type?: string | null;
   280→      bump_number?: number;
   281→      last_bump_date?: string | null;
   282→      bucket?: Bucket | null;
   283→      calendly_sent_via?: CalendlySentVia;
   284→      calendly_sent_date?: string | null;
   285→      calendly_booked_date?: string | null;
   286→      gc_opened?: string;
   287→    }
   288→  ): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   289→    // Get current state for stage history
   290→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   291→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   292→      .select('*')
   293→      .eq('id', id)
   294→      .single();
   295→
   296→    const updateData: any = { ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   297→
   298→    // Auto-set timestamps on stage transitions
   299→    if (updates.stage && current) {
   300→      if (updates.stage === 'discovery_done' && !current.discovery_call_at) {
   301→        updateData.discovery_call_at = new Date().toISOString();
   302→      }
   303→      if (updates.stage === 'proposal_sent' && !current.proposal_sent_at) {
   304→        updateData.proposal_sent_at = new Date().toISOString();
   305→      }
   306→      if ((updates.stage === 'v2_closed_won' || updates.stage === 'v2_closed_lost') && !current.closed_at) {
   307→        updateData.closed_at = new Date().toISOString();
   308→      }
   309→    }
   310→
   311→    // Auto-set bucket_changed_at
   312→    if (updates.bucket && current && updates.bucket !== current.bucket) {
   313→      updateData.bucket_changed_at = new Date().toISOString();
   314→    }
   315→
   316→    const { data: updated, error } = await supabase
   317→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   318→      .update(updateData)
   319→      .eq('id', id)
   320→      .select()
   321→      .single();
   322→
   323→    if (error) throw error;
   324→
   325→    // Record stage change
   326→    if (updates.stage && current && current.stage !== updates.stage) {
   327→      await CRMService.recordStageHistory('opportunity', id, current.stage, updates.stage);
   328→    }
   329→
   330→    // Recalculate temperature score after stage/bucket/key field changes
   331→    await this.recalcTemperature(id);
   332→
   333→    return updated as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   334→  }
   335→
   336→  static async delete(id: string): Promise<void> {
   337→    const { error } = await supabase
   338→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   339→      .delete()
   340→      .eq('id', id);
   341→
   342→    if (error) throw error;
   343→  }
   344→
   345→  // ----------------------------------------
   346→  // BUMPS
   347→  // ----------------------------------------
   348→
   349→  static async recordBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   350→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   351→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   352→      .select('bump_number')
   353→      .eq('id', id)
   354→      .single();
   355→
   356→    const newBumpNumber = (current?.bump_number || 0) + 1;
   357→
   358→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   359→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   360→      .update({
   361→        bump_number: newBumpNumber,
   362→        last_bump_date: new Date().toISOString(),
   363→        last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   364→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   365→      })
   366→      .eq('id', id)
   367→      .select()
   368→      .single();
   369→
   370→    if (error) throw error;
   371→
   372→    // Also create a bump activity
   373→    await this.createActivity({
   374→      opportunity_id: id,
   375→      type: 'bump',
   376→      title: `Bump #${newBumpNumber}`,
   377→    });
   378→
   379→    // Recalculate temperature score
   380→    await this.recalcTemperature(id);
   381→
   382→    return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   383→  }
   384→
   385→  static async reduceBump(id: string): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity> {
   386→    const { data: current } = await supabase
   387→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   388→      .select('bump_number')
   389→      .eq('id', id)
   390→      .single();
   391→
   392→    const newBumpNumber = Math.max((current?.bump_number || 0) - 1, 0);
   393→
   394→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   395→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   396→      .update({
   397→        bump_number: newBumpNumber,
   398→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   399→      })
   400→      .eq('id', id)
   401→      .select()
   402→      .single();
   403→
   404→    if (error) throw error;
   405→    return data as SalesPipelineOpportunity;
   406→  }
   407→

   412→  static async getActivities(opportunityId: string): Promise<CRMActivity[]> {

   414→      .from('crm_activities')
   415→      .select('*')
   416→      .eq('opportunity_id', opportunityId)
   417→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   418→
   419→    if (error) throw error;

   422→
   423→  static async createActivity(activityData: CreateActivityData): Promise<CRMActivity> {
   424→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   425→
   426→    const { data, error } = await supabase

   442→
   443→  // ----------------------------------------
   444→  // BAMFAM VIOLATIONS
   445→  // ----------------------------------------
   446→
   447→  static async getBAMFAMViolations(): Promise<SalesPipelineOpportunity[]> {
   448→    // BAMFAM: past discovery_done with no next_meeting or overdue next_meeting
   449→    const postDiscoveryStages: SalesPipelineStage[] = [
   450→      'discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract',
   451→    ];
   452→
   453→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   454→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   455→      .select(`
   456→        *,
   457→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   458→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   459→      `)
   460→      .in('stage', postDiscoveryStages)
   461→      .or('next_meeting_at.is.null,next_meeting_at.lt.' + new Date().toISOString());
   462→
   463→    if (error) throw error;
   464→    return (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[];
   465→  }
   466→
   467→  // ----------------------------------------
   468→  // STAGES HELPER
   469→  // ----------------------------------------
   470→
   471→  static getAvailableStages(dmAccount: DmAccount): SalesPipelineStage[] {
   472→    if (dmAccount === 'closer') return PATH_A_STAGES;
   473→    return PATH_B_STAGES;
   474→  }
   475→
   476→  // ----------------------------------------
   477→  // METRICS
   478→  // ----------------------------------------
   479→
   480→  static async getMetrics(): Promise<{
   481→    totalCount: number;
   482→    bucketA: number;
   483→    bucketB: number;
   484→    bucketC: number;
   485→    activeValue: number;
   486→    bamfamViolations: number;
   487→  }> {
   488→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   489→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   490→      .select('stage, bucket, deal_value, next_meeting_at')
   491→      .in('stage', ALL_V2_STAGES);
   492→
   493→    if (error) throw error;
   494→
   495→    const opps = data || [];
   496→    const activeStages = PIPELINE_STAGES;
   497→    const active = opps.filter(o => activeStages.includes(o.stage as SalesPipelineStage));
   498→
   499→    const postDiscovery = ['discovery_done', 'proposal_call', 'v2_contract'];
   500→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   501→    const bamfam = opps.filter(o =>
   502→      postDiscovery.includes(o.stage) &&
   503→      (!o.next_meeting_at || o.next_meeting_at < now)
   504→    );
   505→
   506→    return {
   507→      totalCount: opps.length,
   508→      bucketA: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'A').length,
   509→      bucketB: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'B').length,
   510→      bucketC: opps.filter(o => o.bucket === 'C').length,
   511→      activeValue: active.reduce((sum, o) => sum + (o.deal_value || 0), 0),
   512→      bamfamViolations: bamfam.length,
   513→    };
   514→  }
   515→
   516→  // ----------------------------------------
   517→  // POSITION UPDATES
   518→  // ----------------------------------------
   519→
   520→  static async updatePositions(positions: { id: string; position: number; stage?: OpportunityStage }[]): Promise<void> {
   521→    const updates = positions.map(({ id, position, stage }) => {
   522→      const updateData: any = { position, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   523→      if (stage) updateData.stage = stage;
   524→      return supabase
   525→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   526→        .update(updateData)
   527→        .eq('id', id);
   528→    });
   529→
   530→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   531→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   532→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   533→      console.error('Errors updating positions:', errors);
   534→      throw errors[0].error;
   535→    }
   536→  }
   537→
   538→  // ----------------------------------------
   539→  // COLD DM PAGINATED (Outreach tab)
   540→  // ----------------------------------------
   541→
   542→  static async getColdDmsPaginated(
   543→    page: number,
   544→    pageSize: number,
   545→    filters: {
   546→      dm_account?: DmAccount;
   547→      bucket?: Bucket;
   548→      bumpRange?: 'none' | '1-2' | '3+';
   549→      searchTerm?: string;
   550→      sortBy?: string;
   551→      sortAsc?: boolean;
   552→      owner_id?: string;
   553→    }
   554→  ): Promise<{ data: SalesPipelineOpportunity[]; count: number }> {
   555→    const from = (page - 1) * pageSize;
   556→    const to = from + pageSize - 1;
   557→
   558→    let query = supabase
   559→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   560→      .select(`
   561→        *,
   562→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   563→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   564→      `, { count: 'exact' })
   565→      .eq('stage', 'cold_dm');
   566→
   567→    // Optional filters
   568→    if (filters.dm_account) {
   569→      query = query.eq('dm_account', filters.dm_account);
   570→    }
   571→    if (filters.bucket) {
   572→      query = query.eq('bucket', filters.bucket);
   573→    }
   574→    if (filters.searchTerm) {
   575→      query = query.ilike('name', `%${filters.searchTerm}%`);
   576→    }
   577→    if (filters.owner_id) {
   578→      query = query.eq('owner_id', filters.owner_id);
   579→    }
   580→    if (filters.bumpRange === 'none') {
   581→      query = query.eq('bump_number', 0);
   582→    } else if (filters.bumpRange === '1-2') {
   583→      query = query.gte('bump_number', 1).lte('bump_number', 2);
   584→    } else if (filters.bumpRange === '3+') {
   585→      query = query.gte('bump_number', 3);
   586→    }
   587→
   588→    // Sorting
   589→    const sortField = filters.sortBy || 'created_at';
   590→    const ascending = filters.sortAsc ?? false;
   591→    query = query.order(sortField, { ascending });
   592→
   593→    // Pagination
   594→    query = query.range(from, to);
   595→
   596→    const { data, error, count } = await query;
   597→
   598→    if (error) {
   599→      console.error('Error fetching cold DMs paginated:', error);
   600→      throw error;
   601→    }
   602→
   603→    return { data: (data || []) as SalesPipelineOpportunity[], count: count || 0 };
   604→  }
   605→

   607→  // BULK OPERATIONS
   608→  // ----------------------------------------
   609→
   610→  // ----------------------------------------
   611→  // TEMPERATURE SCORE
   612→  // ----------------------------------------
   613→
   614→  static async recalcTemperature(id: string): Promise<number | null> {
   615→    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('calculate_temperature_score', { opp_id: id });
   616→    if (error) {
   617→      console.error('Error recalculating temperature:', error);
   618→      return null;
   619→    }
   620→    return data;
   621→  }
   622→
   623→  static async recalcAllTemperatures(): Promise<number | null> {
   624→    const { data, error } = await supabase.rpc('recalculate_all_temperature_scores');
   625→    if (error) {
   626→      console.error('Error recalculating all temperatures:', error);
   627→      return null;
   628→    }
   629→    return data;
   630→  }
   631→
   632→  // ----------------------------------------
   633→  // BULK OPERATIONS
   634→  // ----------------------------------------
   635→
   636→  static async bulkRecordBump(ids: string[]): Promise<void> {
   637→    await Promise.all(ids.map(id => this.recordBump(id)));
   638→  }
   639→
   640→  static async bulkUpdateStage(ids: string[], stage: SalesPipelineStage): Promise<void> {
   641→    const now = new Date().toISOString();
   642→    const updates = ids.map(id =>
   643→      supabase
   644→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   645→        .update({ stage, updated_at: now })
   646→        .eq('id', id)
   647→    );
   648→
   649→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   650→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   651→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   652→      console.error('Errors in bulk stage update:', errors);
   653→      throw errors[0].error;
   654→    }
   655→  }
   656→
   657→  static async bulkDelete(ids: string[]): Promise<void> {
   658→    const deletes = ids.map(id =>
   659→      supabase
   660→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   661→        .delete()
   662→        .eq('id', id)
   663→    );
   664→
   665→    const results = await Promise.all(deletes);
   666→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   667→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   668→      console.error('Errors in bulk delete:', errors);
   669→      throw errors[0].error;
   670→    }
   671→  }
   672→
```

```typescript
import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';
import { supabase } from './supabase';

const supabaseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!;
const supabaseAnonKey = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!;

// Public client for unauthenticated booking pages
export const supabasePublic = createClient(supabaseUrl, supabaseAnonKey);

// ============================================
// Types
// ============================================

export interface AvailableSlot {
  day: number; // 0=Sun, 1=Mon, ..., 6=Sat
  start: string; // "HH:MM"
  end: string; // "HH:MM"
}

export interface BookingPage {
  id: string;
  user_id: string;
  slug: string;
  title: string | null;
  description: string | null;
  slot_duration_minutes: number;
  available_slots: AvailableSlot[];
  is_active: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
  user?: {
    name: string;
    email: string;
    profile_photo_url: string | null;
  };
}

export interface Booking {
  id: string;
  booking_page_id: string;
  opportunity_id: string | null;
  booker_name: string;
  booker_email: string;
  meeting_date: string; // YYYY-MM-DD
  start_time: string; // HH:MM:SS
  end_time: string; // HH:MM:SS
  status: 'confirmed' | 'cancelled';
  notes: string | null;
  created_at: string;
}

export interface CreateBookingData {
  booking_page_id: string;
  opportunity_id?: string | null;
  booker_name: string;
  booker_email: string;
  meeting_date: string;
  start_time: string;
  end_time: string;
  notes?: string;
}

export interface TimeSlot {
  start: string; // "HH:MM"
  end: string; // "HH:MM"
}

// ============================================
// Booking Service
// ============================================

export class BookingService {
  /**
   * Fetch a booking page by slug (public, no auth needed)
   */
  static async getBookingPageBySlug(slug: string): Promise<BookingPage | null> {
    const { data, error } = await supabasePublic
      .from('booking_pages')
      .select(`
        *,
        user:users!booking_pages_user_id_fkey(name, email, profile_photo_url)
      `)
      .eq('slug', slug)
      .eq('is_active', true)
      .single();

    if (error) {
      if (error.code === 'PGRST116') return null; // Not found
      console.error('Error fetching booking page:', error);
      return null;
    }

    return data as BookingPage;
  }

  /**
   * Compute available time slots for a given date.
   * Returns slots from available_slots config minus already-booked slots.
   */
  static async getAvailableSlots(
    bookingPageId: string,
    date: string, // YYYY-MM-DD
    availableSlots: AvailableSlot[],
    slotDurationMinutes: number
  ): Promise<TimeSlot[]> {
    // Get day of week for the date (0=Sun)
    const dateObj = new Date(date + 'T00:00:00Z');
    const dayOfWeek = dateObj.getUTCDay();

    // Find config slots for this day
    const daySlots = availableSlots.filter(s => s.day === dayOfWeek);
    if (daySlots.length === 0) return [];

    // Generate all possible slots
    const allSlots: TimeSlot[] = [];
    for (const daySlot of daySlots) {
      const [startH, startM] = daySlot.start.split(':').map(Number);
      const [endH, endM] = daySlot.end.split(':').map(Number);
      const startMinutes = startH * 60 + startM;
      const endMinutes = endH * 60 + endM;

      for (let m = startMinutes; m + slotDurationMinutes <= endMinutes; m += slotDurationMinutes) {
        const slotStart = `${String(Math.floor(m / 60)).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(m % 60).padStart(2, '0')}`;
        const slotEndM = m + slotDurationMinutes;
        const slotEnd = `${String(Math.floor(slotEndM / 60)).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(slotEndM % 60).padStart(2, '0')}`;
        allSlots.push({ start: slotStart, end: slotEnd });
      }
    }

    // Fetch existing bookings for this date
    const { data: existingBookings } = await supabasePublic
      .from('bookings')
      .select('start_time, end_time')
      .eq('booking_page_id', bookingPageId)
      .eq('meeting_date', date)
      .eq('status', 'confirmed');

    if (!existingBookings || existingBookings.length === 0) return allSlots;

    // Filter out booked slots
    const bookedTimes = new Set(
      existingBookings.map(b => b.start_time.substring(0, 5)) // "HH:MM"
    );

    return allSlots.filter(slot => !bookedTimes.has(slot.start));
  }

  /**
   * Create a booking (public, no auth needed).
   * Optionally links to an opportunity and updates its fields.
   */
  static async createBooking(data: CreateBookingData): Promise<Booking> {
    const insertData: any = {
      booking_page_id: data.booking_page_id,
      booker_name: data.booker_name,
      booker_email: data.booker_email,
      meeting_date: data.meeting_date,
      start_time: data.start_time,
      end_time: data.end_time,
      notes: data.notes || null,
      status: 'confirmed',
    };

    if (data.opportunity_id) {
      insertData.opportunity_id = data.opportunity_id;
    }

    const { data: booking, error } = await supabasePublic
      .from('bookings')
      .insert([insertData])
      .select()
      .single();

    if (error) {
      console.error('Error creating booking:', error);
      throw error;
    }

    // If linked to an opportunity, update its fields
    if (data.opportunity_id) {
      const meetingDatetime = `${data.meeting_date}T${data.start_time}:00Z`;
      const outreachStages = ['cold_dm', 'warm', 'tg_intro'];

      // Get current opportunity stage
      const { data: opp } = await supabasePublic
        .from('crm_opportunities')
        .select('stage')
        .eq('id', data.opportunity_id)
        .single();

      const updates: any = {
        next_meeting_at: meetingDatetime,
        calendly_booked_date: new Date().toISOString(),
        next_meeting_type: 'discovery',
        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      };

      // Auto-advance stage if in outreach
      if (opp && outreachStages.includes(opp.stage)) {
        updates.stage = 'booked';
      }

      await supabasePublic
        .from('crm_opportunities')
        .update(updates)
        .eq('id', data.opportunity_id);
    }

    return booking as Booking;
  }

  /**
   * Get bookings for a page within a date range (authenticated)
   */
  static async getBookingsByPage(
    bookingPageId: string,
    startDate?: string,
    endDate?: string
  ): Promise<Booking[]> {
    let query = supabase
      .from('bookings')
      .select('*')
      .eq('booking_page_id', bookingPageId)
      .order('meeting_date', { ascending: true })
      .order('start_time', { ascending: true });

    if (startDate) query = query.gte('meeting_date', startDate);
    if (endDate) query = query.lte('meeting_date', endDate);

    const { data, error } = await query;
    if (error) throw error;
    return (data || []) as Booking[];
  }

  /**
   * Get the current user's booking page (authenticated)
   */
  static async getMyBookingPage(): Promise<BookingPage | null> {
    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
    if (!user) return null;

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('booking_pages')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', user.id)
      .single();

    if (error) {
      if (error.code === 'PGRST116') return null;
      throw error;
    }
    return data as BookingPage;
  }

  /**
   * Update a booking page (authenticated, owner only)
   */
  static async updateBookingPage(
    id: string,
    updates: Partial<Pick<BookingPage, 'title' | 'description' | 'slug' | 'slot_duration_minutes' | 'available_slots' | 'is_active'>>
  ): Promise<BookingPage> {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('booking_pages')
      .update({ ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
      .eq('id', id)
      .select()
      .single();

    if (error) throw error;
    return data as BookingPage;
  }

  /**
   * Cancel a booking (set status to cancelled)
   */
  static async cancelBooking(id: string): Promise<Booking> {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('bookings')
      .update({ status: 'cancelled' })
      .eq('id', id)
      .select()
      .single();

    if (error) throw error;
    return data as Booking;
  }

  /**
   * Get booking page by user_id (for generating booking links in pipeline)
   */
  static async getBookingPageByUserId(userId: string): Promise<BookingPage | null> {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('booking_pages')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .single();

    if (error) {
      if (error.code === 'PGRST116') return null;
      return null;
    }
    return data as BookingPage;
  }
}

```
