```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation';
import Image from 'next/image';
import { BookingService, BookingPage, TimeSlot } from '@/lib/bookingService';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { CheckCircle2, Loader, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Clock, Calendar, User, Mail, MessageSquare } from 'lucide-react';

const DAYS = ['Sun', 'Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat'];
const MONTHS = ['January', 'February', 'March', 'April', 'May', 'June', 'July', 'August', 'September', 'October', 'November', 'December'];

function getNext14Days(): Date[] {
  const days: Date[] = [];
  const today = new Date();
  for (let i = 0; i < 14; i++) {
    const d = new Date(today);
    d.setDate(today.getDate() + i);
    days.push(d);
  }
  return days;
}

function formatDateKey(date: Date): string {
  const y = date.getFullYear();
  const m = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const d = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${y}-${m}-${d}`;
}

export default function PublicBookingPage({ params }: { params: { slug: string } }) {
  const slug = params.slug;
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const oppId = searchParams.get('opp');

  const [bookingPage, setBookingPage] = useState<BookingPage | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // Flow state
  const [step, setStep] = useState<'date' | 'time' | 'form' | 'success'>('date');
  const [selectedDate, setSelectedDate] = useState<Date | null>(null);
  const [availableSlots, setAvailableSlots] = useState<TimeSlot[]>([]);
  const [loadingSlots, setLoadingSlots] = useState(false);
  const [selectedSlot, setSelectedSlot] = useState<TimeSlot | null>(null);

  // Form
  const [bookerName, setBookerName] = useState('');
  const [bookerEmail, setBookerEmail] = useState('');
  const [notes, setNotes] = useState('');
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);

  // Calendar
  const [calendarDays] = useState(getNext14Days);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchBookingPage();
  }, [slug]);

  const fetchBookingPage = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const page = await BookingService.getBookingPageBySlug(slug);
      if (!page) {
        setError('Booking page not found');
        return;
      }
      setBookingPage(page);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error fetching booking page:', err);
      setError('Failed to load booking page');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDateSelect = async (date: Date) => {
    setSelectedDate(date);
    setSelectedSlot(null);
    setLoadingSlots(true);

    try {
      const dateKey = formatDateKey(date);
      const slots = await BookingService.getAvailableSlots(
        bookingPage!.id,
        dateKey,
        bookingPage!.available_slots,
        bookingPage!.slot_duration_minutes
      );
      setAvailableSlots(slots);
      setStep('time');
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error fetching slots:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoadingSlots(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSlotSelect = (slot: TimeSlot) => {
    setSelectedSlot(slot);
    setStep('form');
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!selectedDate || !selectedSlot || !bookingPage) return;

    setSubmitting(true);
    try {
      await BookingService.createBooking({
        booking_page_id: bookingPage.id,
        opportunity_id: oppId || undefined,
        booker_name: bookerName.trim(),
        booker_email: bookerEmail.trim(),
        meeting_date: formatDateKey(selectedDate),
        start_time: selectedSlot.start,
        end_time: selectedSlot.end,
        notes: notes.trim() || undefined,
      });
      setStep('success');
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error creating booking:', err);
      alert('Failed to create booking. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  // Loading
  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-center">
          <Loader className="h-12 w-12 animate-spin text-[#3e8692] mx-auto mb-4" />
          <p className="text-gray-600 text-lg font-medium">Loading...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Error
  if (error || !bookingPage) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-6">
        <div className="text-center max-w-md">
          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
          </div>
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Page Not Found</h2>
          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600">{error || 'This booking page does not exist.'}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Success
  if (step === 'success') {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-6">
        <div className="text-center max-w-md">
          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
          </div>
          <div className="rounded-full bg-green-50 p-4 w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center">
            <CheckCircle2 className="h-10 w-10 text-green-600" />
          </div>
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Meeting Booked!</h2>
          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl p-6 text-left space-y-3 mb-6">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <Calendar className="h-5 w-5 text-[#3e8692]" />
              <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">
                {selectedDate && `${DAYS[selectedDate.getDay()]}, ${MONTHS[selectedDate.getMonth()]} ${selectedDate.getDate()}, ${selectedDate.getFullYear()}`}
              </span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <Clock className="h-5 w-5 text-[#3e8692]" />
              <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">
                {selectedSlot?.start} - {selectedSlot?.end} UTC
              </span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <User className="h-5 w-5 text-[#3e8692]" />
              <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">{bookerName}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">A confirmation has been noted. You&apos;ll be contacted with meeting details.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const ownerName = bookingPage.user?.name || 'Team Member';
  const ownerPhoto = bookingPage.user?.profile_photo_url;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white">
      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-6 py-12">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="text-center mb-10">
          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="HoloHive" width={50} height={50} className="rounded-xl" />
          </div>

          {/* Owner avatar */}
          <div className="flex justify-center mb-4">
            {ownerPhoto ? (
              <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-full overflow-hidden border-2 border-gray-100">
                <img src={ownerPhoto} alt={ownerName} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-[#3e8692] to-[#2d6470] flex items-center justify-center">
                <span className="text-white font-bold text-xl">
                  {ownerName.split(' ').map(w => w[0]).join('').slice(0, 2)}
                </span>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
            {bookingPage.title || `Book a call with ${ownerName}`}
          </h1>
          {bookingPage.description && (
            <p className="text-gray-600 text-lg">{bookingPage.description}</p>
          )}
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mt-3 text-sm text-gray-400">
            <Clock className="h-4 w-4" />
            <span>{bookingPage.slot_duration_minutes} min</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Step indicator */}
        <div className="flex justify-center gap-2 mb-8">
          {['date', 'time', 'form'].map((s, i) => (
            <div
              key={s}
              className={`h-1.5 rounded-full transition-all ${
                s === step ? 'bg-[#3e8692] w-8' :
                ['date', 'time', 'form'].indexOf(step) > i ? 'bg-[#3e8692] opacity-30 w-4' :
                'bg-gray-200 w-4'
              }`}
            />
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Step: Date picker */}
        {step === 'date' && (
          <div>
            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-4 text-center">Select a date</h2>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-2">
              {/* Day headers */}
              {DAYS.map(d => (
                <div key={d} className="text-center text-xs font-medium text-gray-400 pb-2">{d}</div>
              ))}

              {/* Offset for first day alignment */}
              {Array.from({ length: calendarDays[0].getDay() }).map((_, i) => (
                <div key={`empty-${i}`} />
              ))}

              {/* Date cells */}
              {calendarDays.map(date => {
                const dayOfWeek = date.getDay();
                const hasSlots = bookingPage.available_slots.some(s => s.day === dayOfWeek);
                const isToday = formatDateKey(date) === formatDateKey(new Date());

                return (
                  <button
                    key={formatDateKey(date)}
                    onClick={() => hasSlots && handleDateSelect(date)}
                    disabled={!hasSlots}
                    className={`
                      aspect-square rounded-lg flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-sm transition-all
                      ${hasSlots
                        ? 'hover:bg-[#3e8692] hover:text-white cursor-pointer border border-gray-200 hover:border-[#3e8692]'
                        : 'text-gray-300 cursor-not-allowed'
                      }
                      ${isToday ? 'font-bold' : ''}
                    `}
                  >
                    <span className="text-lg">{date.getDate()}</span>
                    <span className="text-[10px] opacity-60">{MONTHS[date.getMonth()].slice(0, 3)}</span>
                  </button>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Step: Time slots */}
        {step === 'time' && (
          <div>
            <button
              onClick={() => { setStep('date'); setSelectedDate(null); }}
              className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700 mb-4"
            >
              <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" /> Back to dates
            </button>

            <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-1 text-center">
              {selectedDate && `${DAYS[selectedDate.getDay()]}, ${MONTHS[selectedDate.getMonth()]} ${selectedDate.getDate()}`}
            </h2>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-400 text-center mb-6">All times in UTC</p>

            {loadingSlots ? (
              <div className="flex justify-center py-12">
                <Loader className="h-8 w-8 animate-spin text-[#3e8692]" />
              </div>
            ) : availableSlots.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="text-center py-12 text-gray-500">
                <Clock className="h-12 w-12 mx-auto mb-3 text-gray-300" />
                <p className="font-medium">No available slots</p>
                <p className="text-sm">Please try another date.</p>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="grid grid-cols-3 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                {availableSlots.map(slot => (
                  <button
                    key={slot.start}
                    onClick={() => handleSlotSelect(slot)}
                    className="py-3 px-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:border-[#3e8692] hover:bg-[#3e8692] hover:text-white transition-all"
                  >
                    {slot.start}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Step: Booking form */}
        {step === 'form' && (
          <div>
            <button
              onClick={() => { setStep('time'); setSelectedSlot(null); }}
              className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700 mb-4"
            >
              <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" /> Back to times
            </button>

            {/* Selected slot summary */}
            <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl p-4 mb-6 flex items-center gap-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <Calendar className="h-4 w-4 text-[#3e8692]" />
                {selectedDate && `${DAYS[selectedDate.getDay()]}, ${MONTHS[selectedDate.getMonth()]} ${selectedDate.getDate()}`}
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-[#3e8692]" />
                {selectedSlot?.start} - {selectedSlot?.end} UTC
              </div>
            </div>

            <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-5">
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="name">Your Name *</Label>
                <div className="relative">
                  <User className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
                  <Input
                    id="name"
                    required
                    value={bookerName}
                    onChange={e => setBookerName(e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="Enter your name"
                    className="pl-10"
                  />
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="email">Your Email *</Label>
                <div className="relative">
                  <Mail className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
                  <Input
                    id="email"
                    type="email"
                    required
                    value={bookerEmail}
                    onChange={e => setBookerEmail(e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="Enter your email"
                    className="pl-10"
                  />
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="notes">Notes (optional)</Label>
                <div className="relative">
                  <MessageSquare className="absolute left-3 top-3 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
                  <Textarea
                    id="notes"
                    value={notes}
                    onChange={e => setNotes(e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="Anything you'd like to discuss?"
                    rows={3}
                    className="pl-10"
                  />
                </div>
              </div>

              <Button
                type="submit"
                disabled={submitting || !bookerName.trim() || !bookerEmail.trim()}
                className="w-full h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg hover:opacity-90 transition-all"
                style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
              >
                {submitting ? (
                  <>
                    <Loader className="h-5 w-5 animate-spin mr-2" />
                    Booking...
                  </>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    Confirm Booking
                    <ChevronRight className="h-5 w-5 ml-2" />
                  </>
                )}
              </Button>
            </form>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="mt-12 text-center">
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-300">Powered by HoloHive</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-06 04:01:07Z)**_

All 7 booking pages are seeded correctly. Here's a summary of everything implemented:

## Implementation Complete

### Database
- **`booking_pages`** table — 7 rows seeded (one per active user: andy, bolt, jaymz, jdot, jeremy, quazo, yano)
- **`bookings`** table — for storing scheduled meetings
- RLS policies: public SELECT on active pages, public INSERT on bookings, authenticated full access
- Indexes on slug, user_id, booking_page+date, opportunity_id
- **Telegram trigger** (`notify_new_booking`) fires `pg_notify` on new booking insert

### Files Created
1. **`lib/bookingService.ts`** — Full service with `getBookingPageBySlug`, `getAvailableSlots`, `createBooking`, `getMyBookingPage`, `updateBookingPage`, `cancelBooking`, `getBookingPageByUserId`
2. **`app/public/book/[slug]/page.tsx`** — Public booking page with 3-step flow: date picker (14 days) → time slot selection → name/email/notes form → success screen. Supports `?opp=<id>` to auto-link and update opportunities
3. **`app/public/book/[slug]/layout.tsx`** — SSR metadata

### Files Modified
4. **`app/settings/page.tsx`** — Added "Booking Page" card with: active toggle, public URL display + copy/open buttons, title/description/slug editing, meeting duration selector (15/30/45/60 min), day-of-week checkboxes with start/end time pickers
5. **`app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`** — Added "Copy Booking Link" button in both the edit dialog and slide-over Quick Actions. Generates `app.holohive.io/public/book/[slug]?opp=[id]` URL. When a booking comes in with `?opp=`, it auto-updates `next_meeting_at`, `calendly_booked_date`, and advances stage to `booked` if in outreach stages

---

_**User (2026-03-06 04:06:24Z)**_

How does the booking stuff work with the sales pipeline page?

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-06 04:06:32Z)**_

When you're looking at an opportunity in the sales pipeline, there are two places to copy a booking link:

1. **Slide-over view** (Quick Actions) — a "Copy Booking Link" button appears alongside "Move to Orbit" and "Delete" when the opportunity has an owner
2. **Edit dialog** — a "Copy Booking Link" button appears above the Cancel/Update footer

Both generate a URL like:
```
https://app.holohive.io/public/book/yano?opp=<opportunity-id>
```

The `?opp=` param is the key piece. When a prospect books through that link, `createBooking` in `bookingService.ts` automatically:

1. Sets `next_meeting_at` to the booked datetime
2. Sets `calendly_booked_date` to now
3. Sets `next_meeting_type` to `'discovery'`
4. If the opportunity is in `cold_dm`, `warm`, or `tg_intro` stage, advances it to `booked`

So the flow is: you copy the booking link from the pipeline → send it to the prospect → they book a slot → the opportunity updates itself without any manual work.

---

  1204→      case 'stale':
  1205→        return new Set(pipelineActive.filter(o => {
  1206→          const lastDate = o.last_contacted_at || o.last_bump_date || o.created_at;
  1207→          if (!lastDate) return true;
  1208→          const daysSince = Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(lastDate).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  1209→          return daysSince >= 7;
  1210→        }).map(o => o.id));
  1211→      case 'at_risk':
  1212→        return new Set(opportunities.filter(o =>
  1213→          POST_DISC.includes(o.stage) && o.temperature_score < 40
  1214→        ).map(o => o.id));
  1215→      case 'meetings':
  1216→        return new Set(pipelineActive.filter(o =>
  1217→          o.next_meeting_at && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) >= todayStart && new Date(o.next_meeting_at) < weekEnd
  1218→        ).map(o => o.id));
  1219→      default:
  1220→        return null;
  1221→    }
  1222→  }, [alertCardFilter, opportunities]);
  1223→
  1224→  const displayedActions = useMemo(() => {
  1225→    let items = actionPhaseFilter === 'outreach' ? outreachActions
  1226→      : actionPhaseFilter === 'closing' ? closingActions
  1227→      : actionPhaseFilter === 'orbit' ? orbitActions
  1228→      : actionPhaseFilter === 'non_urgent' ? nonUrgentItems
  1229→      : actionItems;
  1230→
  1231→    // Apply alert card filter
  1232→    if (alertCardOppIds) {
  1233→      items = items.filter(({ opp }) => alertCardOppIds.has(opp.id));
  1234→    }
  1235→
  1236→    if (actionSort === 'priority' && actionPhaseFilter !== 'non_urgent') return items;
  1237→    const stageIdx: Record<string, number> = {};
  1238→    [...PIPELINE_STAGES, 'orbit', 'nurture', 'v2_closed_lost'].forEach((s, i) => { stageIdx[s] = i; });
  1239→
  1240→    return [...items].sort((a, b) => {
  1241→      switch (actionSort) {
  1242→        case 'stage': return (stageIdx[a.opp.stage] ?? 99) - (stageIdx[b.opp.stage] ?? 99);
  1243→        case 'temperature': return (b.opp.temperature_score || 0) - (a.opp.temperature_score || 0);
  1244→        case 'value': return (b.opp.deal_value || 0) - (a.opp.deal_value || 0);
  1245→        case 'name': return (a.opp.name || '').localeCompare(b.opp.name || '');
  1246→        case 'newest': return new Date(b.opp.created_at).getTime() - new Date(a.opp.created_at).getTime();
  1247→        case 'oldest': return new Date(a.opp.created_at).getTime() - new Date(b.opp.created_at).getTime();
  1248→        default: return 0;
  1249→      }
  1250→    });
  1251→  }, [actionPhaseFilter, outreachActions, closingActions, orbitActions, actionItems, nonUrgentItems, actionSort, alertCardOppIds]);

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-06 04:10:53Z)**_

Here's the difference:

**"Booked!"** (line 1068) — appears when an opp is in `tg_intro` stage. It means the prospect has agreed to a meeting and you're ready to advance them to the `booked` stage. The hint says "Send Calendly link on TG to schedule." Clicking it moves the opp from `tg_intro` → `booked`. It's a **stage transition** action.

**"Schedule Meeting"** (line 1077) — appears when an opp is already in the `booked` stage but has no `next_meeting_at` date set. It means they've been marked as booked but nobody actually set the meeting date/time yet. Clicking it opens the detail panel so you can fill in the meeting datetime. It's a **data entry** action.

So the flow is:
1. `tg_intro` → click **"Booked!"** → moves to `booked` stage
2. `booked` (no meeting date) → click **"Schedule Meeting"** → prompts you to set the actual date/time
3. `booked` (meeting date set, future) → shows **"Prep for Meeting"**
4. `booked` (meeting date in past) → shows **"Discovery Done"**

With the new booking system, step 2 can happen automatically — if you send the booking link with `?opp=`, the prospect books themselves and `next_meeting_at` gets set without manual entry.

  1269→    'Schedule Call': { label: 'Schedule Call', hint: 'Book a call to discuss the contract. Click Edit → set the Next Meeting date field.' },
  1270→    'Log Meeting Outcome': { label: 'Log Meeting Outcome', hint: 'A meeting just happened — add an activity below with the outcome, key takeaways, and next steps. Update the Next Meeting date if another was scheduled.' },
  1271→    'Reschedule': { label: 'Reschedule Meeting', hint: 'Meeting needs rescheduling. Click the pencil icon (Edit) → update the Next Meeting date field.' },
  1272→    'No Show': { label: 'No Show', hint: 'They didn\'t show up. Log a "No Show" activity below and decide whether to reschedule or orbit.' },
  1273→    'Keep Bumping': { label: 'Keep Bumping', hint: 'Override the orbit suggestion — review notes and continue follow-up DMs.' },
  1274→    'Re-engage or Orbit': { label: 'Re-engage', hint: 'It\'s been 7+ days with no progress on TG. Send them a nudge — if still no reply, consider orbiting.' },
  1275→    'Update Stage': { label: 'Fix Stage', hint: 'Proposal was already sent but this deal is still in Discovery Done. Move it to the correct stage.' },
  1276→    'Check In': { label: 'Nurture Check-In', hint: 'It\'s been 30+ days. Send a light touch — share content, ask how things are going, or see if timing is better now.' },
  1277→  };
  1278→
  1279→  const openActivityLogPrompt = (oppId: string, oppName: string, type: ActivityType, title: string, showMeetingPicker?: boolean) => {
  1280→    setActivityLogPrompt({ oppId, oppName, type, title, showMeetingPicker });
  1281→    setActivityLogForm({ title, description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '', meeting_date: undefined, meeting_time: undefined, next_step_date: undefined });
  1282→  };
  1283→
  1284→  const handleActionExecute = async (oppId: string, action: ReturnType<typeof getNextAction>, opp: SalesPipelineOpportunity) => {
  1285→    setExecutingAction(oppId);
  1286→    try {
  1287→      if (action.actionType === 'bump') {
  1288→        await handleRecordBump(oppId);
  1289→        // Show activity log popup after bump
  1290→        const bumpTitle = action.label === 'Send First DM' ? 'First DM sent' : `${action.label} sent`;
  1291→        openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'message', bumpTitle);
  1292→      } else if (action.actionType === 'stage_change' && action.targetStage) {
  1293→        await handleStageChange(oppId, action.targetStage, opp.stage);
  1294→        // Skip activity log for stages that have their own prompts (orbit, closed_lost, tg_intro, discovery_done)
  1295→        const stagesWithOwnPrompts = ['orbit', 'v2_closed_lost', 'tg_intro', 'discovery_done'];
  1296→        if (!stagesWithOwnPrompts.includes(action.targetStage)) {
  1297→          const stageActivityMap: Record<string, { type: ActivityType; title: string; showMeetingPicker?: boolean }> = {
  1298→            'warm': { type: 'message', title: 'KOL replied' },
  1299→            'booked': { type: 'meeting', title: 'Meeting booked', showMeetingPicker: true },
  1300→            'proposal_call': { type: 'call', title: 'Proposal call set', showMeetingPicker: true },
  1301→            'v2_contract': { type: 'call', title: 'Moving to contract' },
  1302→            'v2_closed_won': { type: 'note', title: 'Deal closed won!' },
  1303→          };
  1304→          const mapping = stageActivityMap[action.targetStage];
  1305→          if (mapping) {
  1306→            openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, mapping.type, mapping.title, mapping.showMeetingPicker);
  1307→          }
  1308→        }
  1309→      } else {
  1310→        // open_detail actions
  1311→        if (action.label === 'Book Next Meeting!' || action.label === 'Schedule Meeting') {
  1312→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'meeting', 'Meeting scheduled', true);
  1313→        } else if (action.label === 'Log Meeting Outcome') {
  1314→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'meeting', 'Meeting outcome', false);
  1315→        } else if (action.label === 'Send Proposal') {
  1316→          // Mark proposal as sent, then show activity log
  1317→          await SalesPipelineService.update(oppId, { proposal_sent_at: new Date().toISOString() } as any);
  1318→          openActivityLogPrompt(oppId, opp.name, 'proposal', 'Proposal sent');
  1319→          await fetchData();
  1320→        } else {
  1321→          const guidance = ACTION_GUIDANCE[action.label];
  1322→          openSlideOver(opp, guidance);
  1323→        }
  1324→      }
  1325→    } finally {
  1326→      setExecutingAction(null);
  1327→    }
  1328→  };
  1329→
  1330→  const confirmActivityLog = async () => {
  1331→    if (!activityLogPrompt) return;
  1332→    setIsActivityLogSubmitting(true);
  1333→    try {
  1334→      // Create the activity
  1335→      await SalesPipelineService.createActivity({

  1337→        type: activityLogPrompt.type,

  1339→        description: activityLogForm.description || undefined,

  1342→        next_step_date: activityLogForm.next_step_date || undefined,
  1343→      });
  1344→      // Always update last_contacted_at so past-meeting checks know the outcome was handled
  1345→      const activityUpdate: any = { last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString() };
  1346→      // If meeting picker was shown and a date was set, also update next_meeting_at
  1347→      if (activityLogPrompt.showMeetingPicker && activityLogForm.meeting_date) {
  1348→        const meetingDate = new Date(activityLogForm.meeting_date);
  1349→        if (activityLogForm.meeting_time) {
  1350→          const [h, m] = activityLogForm.meeting_time.split(':').map(Number);
  1351→          meetingDate.setHours(h, m, 0, 0);
  1352→        }
  1353→        activityUpdate.next_meeting_at = meetingDate.toISOString();
  1354→      }
  1355→      await SalesPipelineService.update(activityLogPrompt.oppId, activityUpdate);
  1356→      setActivityLogPrompt(null);
  1357→      setActivityLogForm({ title: '', description: '', outcome: '', next_step: '', meeting_date: undefined, meeting_time: undefined, next_step_date: undefined });
  1358→      await fetchData();
  1359→      if (activeTab === 'outreach') await fetchOutreach();
  1360→    } catch (err) {
  1361→      console.error('Error logging activity:', err);
  1362→    } finally {
  1363→      setIsActivityLogSubmitting(false);
  1364→    }
  1365→  };

   246→        </div>
   247→
   248→        {/* Step: Date picker */}
   249→        {step === 'date' && (

   256→              ))}
   257→
   258→              {/* Offset for first day alignment */}
   259→              {Array.from({ length: calendarDays[0].getDay() }).map((_, i) => (
   260→                <div key={`empty-${i}`} />
   261→              ))}
   262→
   263→              {/* Date cells */}
   264→              {calendarDays.map(date => {
   265→                const dayOfWeek = date.getDay();
   266→                const hasSlots = bookingPage.available_slots.some(s => s.day === dayOfWeek);
   267→                const isToday = formatDateKey(date) === formatDateKey(new Date());
   268→
   269→                return (
   270→                  <button
   271→                    key={formatDateKey(date)}
   272→                    onClick={() => hasSlots && handleDateSelect(date)}
   273→                    disabled={!hasSlots}
   274→                    className={`
   275→                      aspect-square rounded-lg flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-sm transition-all
   276→                      ${hasSlots
   277→                        ? 'hover:bg-[#3e8692] hover:text-white cursor-pointer border border-gray-200 hover:border-[#3e8692]'
   278→                        : 'text-gray-300 cursor-not-allowed'
   279→                      }
   280→                      ${isToday ? 'font-bold' : ''}
   281→                    `}
   282→                  >
   283→                    <span className="text-lg">{date.getDate()}</span>
   284→                    <span className="text-[10px] opacity-60">{MONTHS[date.getMonth()].slice(0, 3)}</span>
   285→                  </button>
   286→                );
   287→              })}
   288→            </div>
   289→          </div>
   290→        )}
   291→

'use client';

import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
import { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation';
import Image from 'next/image';
import { BookingService, BookingPage, TimeSlot } from '@/lib/bookingService';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { CheckCircle2, Loader, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Clock, Calendar, User, Mail, MessageSquare, Globe } from 'lucide-react';

const DAYS = ['Sun', 'Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri', 'Sat'];
const MONTHS = ['January', 'February', 'March', 'April', 'May', 'June', 'July', 'August', 'September', 'October', 'November', 'December'];

// Common timezone list with friendly labels
const TIMEZONE_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'Pacific/Honolulu', label: 'Hawaii (HST)' },
  { value: 'America/Anchorage', label: 'Alaska (AKST)' },
  { value: 'America/Los_Angeles', label: 'Pacific (PT)' },
  { value: 'America/Denver', label: 'Mountain (MT)' },
  { value: 'America/Chicago', label: 'Central (CT)' },
  { value: 'America/New_York', label: 'Eastern (ET)' },
  { value: 'America/Sao_Paulo', label: 'Brasilia (BRT)' },
  { value: 'Atlantic/Reykjavik', label: 'UTC' },
  { value: 'Europe/London', label: 'London (GMT/BST)' },
  { value: 'Europe/Paris', label: 'Central Europe (CET)' },
  { value: 'Europe/Istanbul', label: 'Istanbul (TRT)' },
  { value: 'Asia/Dubai', label: 'Dubai (GST)' },
  { value: 'Asia/Kolkata', label: 'India (IST)' },
  { value: 'Asia/Bangkok', label: 'Bangkok (ICT)' },
  { value: 'Asia/Singapore', label: 'Singapore (SGT)' },
  { value: 'Asia/Shanghai', label: 'China (CST)' },
  { value: 'Asia/Tokyo', label: 'Japan (JST)' },
  { value: 'Asia/Seoul', label: 'Korea (KST)' },
  { value: 'Australia/Sydney', label: 'Sydney (AEST)' },
  { value: 'Pacific/Auckland', label: 'New Zealand (NZST)' },
];

function formatDateKey(date: Date): string {
  const y = date.getFullYear();
  const m = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const d = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${y}-${m}-${d}`;
}

/** Convert a UTC "HH:MM" time on a given date to a local time string in the given timezone */
function utcTimeToLocal(dateStr: string, utcTime: string, timezone: string): string {
  const [h, m] = utcTime.split(':').map(Number);
  const utcDate = new Date(`${dateStr}T${String(h).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')}:00Z`);
  return utcDate.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', {
    hour: 'numeric',
    minute: '2-digit',
    hour12: true,
    timeZone: timezone,
  });
}

/** Get the user's local timezone IANA name */
function getLocalTimezone(): string {
  try {
    return Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone;
  } catch {
    return 'Atlantic/Reykjavik'; // fallback to UTC
  }
}

/** Get a short label for a timezone */
function getTimezoneLabel(tz: string): string {
  const match = TIMEZONE_OPTIONS.find(o => o.value === tz);
  if (match) return match.label;
  // If user's local tz isn't in our list, format it nicely
  try {
    const now = new Date();
    const short = now.toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { timeZone: tz, timeZoneName: 'short' }).split(' ').pop();
    return `${tz.split('/').pop()?.replace(/_/g, ' ')} (${short})`;
  } catch {
    return tz;
  }
}

export default function PublicBookingPage({ params }: { params: { slug: string } }) {
  const slug = params.slug;
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const oppId = searchParams.get('opp');

  const [bookingPage, setBookingPage] = useState<BookingPage | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // Flow state
  const [step, setStep] = useState<'date' | 'time' | 'form' | 'success'>('date');
  const [selectedDate, setSelectedDate] = useState<Date | null>(null);
  const [availableSlots, setAvailableSlots] = useState<TimeSlot[]>([]);
  const [loadingSlots, setLoadingSlots] = useState(false);
  const [selectedSlot, setSelectedSlot] = useState<TimeSlot | null>(null);

  // Form
  const [bookerName, setBookerName] = useState('');
  const [bookerEmail, setBookerEmail] = useState('');
  const [notes, setNotes] = useState('');
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);

  // Timezone
  const [timezone, setTimezone] = useState(getLocalTimezone());

  // Calendar month navigation
  const today = new Date();
  const [calendarMonth, setCalendarMonth] = useState({ year: today.getFullYear(), month: today.getMonth() });

  // Ensure user's local tz is in dropdown options
  const timezoneOptions = useMemo(() => {
    const localTz = getLocalTimezone();
    const exists = TIMEZONE_OPTIONS.some(o => o.value === localTz);
    if (exists) return TIMEZONE_OPTIONS;
    return [{ value: localTz, label: getTimezoneLabel(localTz) }, ...TIMEZONE_OPTIONS];
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchBookingPage();
  }, [slug]);

  const fetchBookingPage = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const page = await BookingService.getBookingPageBySlug(slug);
      if (!page) {
        setError('Booking page not found');
        return;
      }
      setBookingPage(page);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error fetching booking page:', err);
      setError('Failed to load booking page');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDateSelect = async (date: Date) => {
    setSelectedDate(date);
    setSelectedSlot(null);
    setLoadingSlots(true);

    try {
      const dateKey = formatDateKey(date);
      const slots = await BookingService.getAvailableSlots(
        bookingPage!.id,
        dateKey,
        bookingPage!.available_slots,
        bookingPage!.slot_duration_minutes
      );
      setAvailableSlots(slots);
      setStep('time');
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error fetching slots:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoadingSlots(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSlotSelect = (slot: TimeSlot) => {
    setSelectedSlot(slot);
    setStep('form');
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!selectedDate || !selectedSlot || !bookingPage) return;

    setSubmitting(true);
    try {
      await BookingService.createBooking({
        booking_page_id: bookingPage.id,
        opportunity_id: oppId || undefined,
        booker_name: bookerName.trim(),
        booker_email: bookerEmail.trim(),
        meeting_date: formatDateKey(selectedDate),
        start_time: selectedSlot.start,
        end_time: selectedSlot.end,
        notes: notes.trim() || undefined,
      });
      setStep('success');
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error creating booking:', err);
    } finally {
      setSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  /** Format a slot time for display in the selected timezone */
  const formatSlotLocal = (utcTime: string): string => {
    if (!selectedDate) return utcTime;
    return utcTimeToLocal(formatDateKey(selectedDate), utcTime, timezone);
  };

  /** Format slot with UTC reference */
  const formatSlotWithUtc = (utcTime: string): { local: string; utc: string } => {
    return {
      local: selectedDate ? utcTimeToLocal(formatDateKey(selectedDate), utcTime, timezone) : utcTime,
      utc: utcTime + ' UTC',
    };
  };

  // Loading state
  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="text-center">
          <Loader className="h-12 w-12 animate-spin text-[#3e8692] mx-auto mb-4" />
          <p className="text-gray-600 text-lg font-medium">Loading...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Error state
  if (error || !bookingPage) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-6">
        <div className="text-center max-w-md">
          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
          </div>
          <div className="rounded-full bg-red-50 p-4 w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center">
            <Calendar className="h-10 w-10 text-red-500" />
          </div>
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Page Not Available</h2>
          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{error || 'This booking page does not exist.'}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Success state
  if (step === 'success') {
    const startFmt = selectedSlot ? formatSlotWithUtc(selectedSlot.start) : null;
    const endFmt = selectedSlot ? formatSlotWithUtc(selectedSlot.end) : null;
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-6">
        <div className="text-center max-w-md">
          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
          </div>
          <div className="rounded-full bg-green-50 p-4 w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center">
            <CheckCircle2 className="h-10 w-10 text-green-600" />
          </div>
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Meeting Booked!</h2>
          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl p-6 text-left space-y-3 mb-6">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <Calendar className="h-5 w-5 text-[#3e8692] flex-shrink-0" />
              <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">
                {selectedDate && `${DAYS[selectedDate.getDay()]}, ${MONTHS[selectedDate.getMonth()]} ${selectedDate.getDate()}, ${selectedDate.getFullYear()}`}
              </span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <Clock className="h-5 w-5 text-[#3e8692] flex-shrink-0" />
              <div>
                <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">
                  {startFmt?.local} - {endFmt?.local}
                </span>
                <span className="text-gray-400 text-sm ml-2">
                  ({startFmt?.utc} - {endFmt?.utc})
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <User className="h-5 w-5 text-[#3e8692] flex-shrink-0" />
              <span className="text-gray-700 font-medium">{bookerName}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">A confirmation has been noted. You&apos;ll be contacted with meeting details.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const ownerName = bookingPage.user?.name || 'Team Member';
  const ownerPhoto = bookingPage.user?.profile_photo_url;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white">
      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-6 py-16">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="text-center mb-12">
          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="HoloHive" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
          </div>

          {/* Owner avatar */}
          <div className="flex justify-center mb-4">
            {ownerPhoto ? (
              <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-full overflow-hidden border-2 border-gray-100">
                <img src={ownerPhoto} alt={ownerName} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-[#3e8692] to-[#2d6470] flex items-center justify-center">
                <span className="text-white font-bold text-xl">
                  {ownerName.split(' ').map(w => w[0]).join('').slice(0, 2)}
                </span>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">
            {bookingPage.title || `Book a call with ${ownerName}`}
          </h1>
          {bookingPage.description && (
            <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed max-w-xl mx-auto">{bookingPage.description}</p>
          )}
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mt-3 text-sm text-gray-400">
            <Clock className="h-4 w-4" />
            <span>{bookingPage.slot_duration_minutes} min</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Content area */}
        <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto">
          {/* Step indicator */}
          <div className="flex justify-center gap-2 mb-8">
            {['date', 'time', 'form'].map((s, i) => (
              <div
                key={s}
                className={`h-2 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 ${
                  s === step ? 'bg-[#3e8692] w-8' :
                  ['date', 'time', 'form'].indexOf(step) > i ? 'bg-[#3e8692] opacity-30 w-2' :
                  'bg-gray-300 w-2'
                }`}
              />
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Step: Date picker */}
          {step === 'date' && (() => {
            const { year, month } = calendarMonth;
            const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1);
            const lastDay = new Date(year, month + 1, 0);
            const startDow = firstDay.getDay();
            const daysInMonth = lastDay.getDate();
            const todayKey = formatDateKey(new Date());
            const isCurrentMonth = year === today.getFullYear() && month === today.getMonth();

            return (
              <div>
                <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-4 text-center">Select a date</h2>

                {/* Month navigation */}
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => {
                      if (isCurrentMonth) return;
                      setCalendarMonth(prev => {
                        const d = new Date(prev.year, prev.month - 1, 1);
                        return { year: d.getFullYear(), month: d.getMonth() };
                      });
                    }}
                    disabled={isCurrentMonth}
                    className={`p-2 rounded-lg transition-colors ${isCurrentMonth ? 'text-gray-200 cursor-not-allowed' : 'text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-100'}`}
                  >
                    <ChevronLeft className="h-5 w-5" />
                  </button>
                  <span className="text-base font-medium text-gray-700">
                    {MONTHS[month]} {year}
                  </span>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => {
                      setCalendarMonth(prev => {
                        const d = new Date(prev.year, prev.month + 1, 1);
                        return { year: d.getFullYear(), month: d.getMonth() };
                      });
                    }}
                    className="p-2 rounded-lg text-gray-500 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors"
                  >
                    <ChevronRight className="h-5 w-5" />
                  </button>
                </div>

                <div className="grid grid-cols-7 gap-2">
                  {/* Day headers */}
                  {DAYS.map(d => (
                    <div key={d} className="text-center text-xs font-medium text-gray-400 pb-2">{d}</div>
                  ))}

                  {/* Empty cells before first day */}
                  {Array.from({ length: startDow }).map((_, i) => (
                    <div key={`empty-${i}`} />
                  ))}

                  {/* Date cells */}
                  {Array.from({ length: daysInMonth }, (_, i) => {
                    const date = new Date(year, month, i + 1);
                    const dateKey = formatDateKey(date);
                    const dayOfWeek = date.getDay();
                    const hasSlots = bookingPage.available_slots.some(s => s.day === dayOfWeek);
                    const isPast = dateKey < todayKey;
                    const isDisabled = !hasSlots || isPast;
                    const isToday = dateKey === todayKey;

                    return (
                      <button
                        key={dateKey}
                        onClick={() => !isDisabled && handleDateSelect(date)}
                        disabled={isDisabled}
                        className={`
                          aspect-square rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-sm transition-all
                          ${isDisabled
                            ? 'text-gray-300 cursor-not-allowed'
                            : 'hover:bg-[#3e8692] hover:text-white cursor-pointer border border-gray-200 hover:border-[#3e8692]'
                          }
                          ${isToday ? 'font-bold ring-2 ring-[#3e8692]/30' : ''}
                        `}
                      >
                        <span className="text-lg">{i + 1}</span>
                      </button>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          })()}

          {/* Step: Time slots */}
          {step === 'time' && (
            <div>
              <button
                onClick={() => { setStep('date'); setSelectedDate(null); }}
                className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700 mb-4"
              >
                <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" /> Back to dates
              </button>

              <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-800 mb-1 text-center">
                {selectedDate && `${DAYS[selectedDate.getDay()]}, ${MONTHS[selectedDate.getMonth()]} ${selectedDate.getDate()}`}
              </h2>

              {/* Timezone selector */}
              <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mt-2 mb-6">
                <Globe className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
                <Select value={timezone} onValueChange={setTimezone}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="w-auto h-8 text-xs border-gray-200 text-gray-500 gap-1 pr-2">
                    <SelectValue />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    {timezoneOptions.map(tz => (
                      <SelectItem key={tz.value} value={tz.value} className="text-sm">
                        {tz.label}
                      </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              {loadingSlots ? (
                <div className="flex justify-center py-12">
                  <Loader className="h-8 w-8 animate-spin text-[#3e8692]" />
                </div>
              ) : availableSlots.length === 0 ? (
                <div className="text-center py-12 text-gray-500">
                  <Clock className="h-12 w-12 mx-auto mb-3 text-gray-300" />
                  <p className="font-medium">No available slots</p>
                  <p className="text-sm">Please try another date.</p>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                  {availableSlots.map(slot => {
                    const localStart = formatSlotLocal(slot.start);
                    return (
                      <button
                        key={slot.start}
                        onClick={() => handleSlotSelect(slot)}
                        className="py-3 px-4 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:border-[#3e8692] hover:bg-[#3e8692] hover:text-white transition-all group"
                      >
                        <span className="block">{localStart}</span>
                        <span className="block text-[11px] text-gray-400 group-hover:text-white/70 mt-0.5">{slot.start} UTC</span>
                      </button>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Step: Booking form */}
          {step === 'form' && (
            <div>
              <button
                onClick={() => { setStep('time'); setSelectedSlot(null); }}
                className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700 mb-4"
              >
                <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" /> Back to times
              </button>

              {/* Selected slot summary */}
              <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl p-4 mb-6">
                <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                    <Calendar className="h-4 w-4 text-[#3e8692]" />
                    {selectedDate && `${DAYS[selectedDate.getDay()]}, ${MONTHS[selectedDate.getMonth()]} ${selectedDate.getDate()}`}
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600">
                    <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-[#3e8692]" />
                    <span>
                      {selectedSlot && formatSlotLocal(selectedSlot.start)} - {selectedSlot && formatSlotLocal(selectedSlot.end)}
                    </span>
                    <span className="text-gray-400 text-xs">
                      ({selectedSlot?.start} - {selectedSlot?.end} UTC)
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-5">
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label htmlFor="name">Your Name *</Label>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <User className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
                    <Input
                      id="name"
                      required
                      value={bookerName}
                      onChange={e => setBookerName(e.target.value)}
                      placeholder="Enter your name"
                      className="pl-10 auth-input"
                    />
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label htmlFor="email">Your Email *</Label>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <Mail className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
                    <Input
                      id="email"
                      type="email"
                      required
                      value={bookerEmail}
                      onChange={e => setBookerEmail(e.target.value)}
                      placeholder="Enter your email"
                      className="pl-10 auth-input"
                    />
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label htmlFor="notes">Notes <span className="font-normal text-gray-400">(optional)</span></Label>
                  <div className="relative">
                    <MessageSquare className="absolute left-3 top-3 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
                    <Textarea
                      id="notes"
                      value={notes}
                      onChange={e => setNotes(e.target.value)}
                      placeholder="Anything you'd like to discuss?"
                      rows={3}
                      className="pl-10 auth-input"
                    />
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="pt-4">
                  <Button
                    type="submit"
                    disabled={submitting || !bookerName.trim() || !bookerEmail.trim()}
                    className="w-full h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg hover:opacity-90 transition-all disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
                    style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
                  >
                    {submitting ? (
                      <>
                        <Loader className="h-5 w-5 animate-spin" />
                        Booking...
                      </>
                    ) : (
                      <>
                        Confirm Booking
                        <ChevronRight className="h-5 w-5" />
                      </>
                    )}
                  </Button>
                </div>
              </form>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="mt-12 text-center">
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-300">Powered by HoloHive</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-06 04:30:00Z)**_

Build passes. Here's what changed:

**Timezone support:**
- Auto-detects the booker's local timezone via `Intl.DateTimeFormat`
- Time slots show **local time as primary** with UTC underneath in small grey text (e.g. "2:00 PM" with "09:00 UTC" below)
- Timezone dropdown with 20 common timezones (Globe icon + Select) appears on the time slots step
- If the user's detected timezone isn't in the list, it's added automatically as the first option
- Success screen and form summary both show local time with UTC in parentheses

**UI consistency with public forms page:**
- `py-16` padding (was `py-12`)
- `mb-12` header spacing (was `mb-10`)
- Logo `60x60` (was `50x50`)
- Title `text-4xl` (was `text-3xl`)
- Description with `leading-relaxed max-w-xl mx-auto`
- Content wrapped in `max-w-xl mx-auto` like the form page
- Step indicator uses `h-2` dots with `w-2`/`w-8` (matches form page progress dots)
- `auth-input` class on all inputs/textareas
- Error state uses red icon circle like the form page
- Submit button styling matches form page pattern with `pt-4` spacing

**Already-booked slots:** Confirmed — `getAvailableSlots` in the service filters them out before they reach the UI, so booked times never appear as buttons.

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-06 04:45:13Z)**_

<analysis>
Let me chronologically analyze the conversation:

1. User provided a detailed plan for a Custom Booking System with database tables, service files, public booking pages, settings modifications, and sales pipeline integration.

2. I explored the codebase to understand patterns (supabase client, service files, settings page, sales pipeline, UI components, etc.)

3. I created the database migration with booking_pages and bookings tables, RLS policies, seed data, and Telegram trigger.

4. I created lib/bookingService.ts with all the service methods.

5. I created the public booking page at app/public/book/[slug]/page.tsx and layout.tsx.

6. I modified app/settings/page.tsx to add a Booking Page management section.

7. I modified app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx to add Copy Booking Link buttons in both the edit dialog and slide-over Quick Actions.

8. User asked about the difference between "Booked!" and "Schedule Meeting" in action items - I explained.

9. User asked to show the booking copy button in the activity log popup when clicking "Schedule Meeting" and make meeting date/time optional.

10. I added ownerId to activityLogPrompt, added Copy Booking Link button in the activity log dialog, made meeting date/time labels say "(optional)".

11. User asked to replace alert() with toast() for booking link notifications. I added useToast import and replaced all 9 alert() calls with toast().

12. User asked about the 2-week limit on the booking calendar and wanted month navigation. I replaced the 14-day grid with a full month calendar with prev/next navigation.

13. User asked for timezone support - show local time instead of UTC, add timezone dropdown, make UI consistent with other public pages. I rewrote the booking page with timezone conversion, a dropdown of 20 common timezones defaulting to user's local timezone, and matched the UI patterns from the public forms page.

14. User asked to add timezone labels in the confirm booking tab. I updated the form step summary and success screen to show timezone labels.

15. User reported that after booking, the opportunity wasn't updated on the sales pipeline and the slot was still available on the booking page.

16. I investigated and found:
- The booking was created successfully in the DB
- The opportunity's next_meeting_at, calendly_booked_date, and next_meeting_type are all still null
- The stage was moved to 'booked' but the meeting fields weren't updated
- The crm_opportunities UPDATE policy requires `auth.uid() = owner_id OR is_admin_or_super_admin()` - so the anon client can't update opportunities
- The bookings SELECT and INSERT policies use `{public}` role which should work for anon

The root cause: The `createBooking` method in bookingService.ts uses `supabasePublic` (anon/unauthenticated client) to update `crm_opportunities`, but the RLS policy on crm_opportunities only allows authenticated users (owner or admin) to update. The anon client silently fails the update.

For the slot still being available - the bookings policies look correct (public can SELECT and INSERT). Let me think... The booking WAS created (I can see it in the DB). So the getAvailableSlots query should find it and filter it out. Unless there's a timing issue or the query isn't matching correctly. The start_time in the DB is "09:00:00" and the code does `b.start_time.substring(0, 5)` which gives "09:00" - that should match. This needs more investigation.

The two issues to fix:
1. Opportunity update: Need to use a database trigger or a service role approach instead of relying on the anon client to update crm_opportunities
2. Slot availability: Need to debug why the existing booking isn't being filtered out

The best fix for #1 is a database trigger on bookings INSERT that updates the linked opportunity automatically (bypasses RLS since triggers run as the table owner). This is more reliable than trying to update from the client.

For #2, I need to investigate further - possibly the anon SELECT on bookings isn't working, or there's a query issue.
</analysis>

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user requested implementation of a Custom Booking System for HoloHive (app.holohive.io). The system allows team members to have personalized public booking pages at `/public/book/[slug]` where prospects can schedule meetings. Key requirements:
   - Database tables for booking_pages and bookings with RLS policies
   - Public booking page with date picker, time slots, booking form, and `?opp=<id>` URL param support
   - Auto-linking bookings to CRM opportunities (updating next_meeting_at, calendly_booked_date, stage)
   - Booking page management in Settings
   - "Copy Booking Link" button in the sales pipeline
   - Telegram notification on new booking
   - Later additions: month calendar navigation, timezone support with dropdown, UI consistency with public forms page, booking link in activity log popup with optional meeting date/time

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Supabase RLS (Row Level Security) policies for public vs authenticated access
   - Two Supabase clients: `supabase` (browser client with auth) and `supabasePublic` (anon client via `createClient`)
   - UTC time storage with client-side timezone conversion using `Intl.DateTimeFormat` and `toLocaleTimeString`
   - Next.js dynamic routes with `[slug]` parameter
   - shadcn/ui component library (Button, Input, Select, Dialog, etc.)
   - Teal accent color `#3e8692` used throughout
   - `auth-input` CSS class on form inputs for consistency
   - Toast notifications via `useToast` hook from `@/hooks/use-toast`
   - Activity log popup pattern in sales pipeline for stage transitions

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **Database Migration: `create_booking_system`** (applied via Supabase MCP)
     - Creates `booking_pages` table (id, user_id, slug, title, description, slot_duration_minutes, available_slots JSONB, is_active, timestamps)
     - Creates `bookings` table (id, booking_page_id, opportunity_id nullable FK, booker_name, booker_email, meeting_date, start_time, end_time, status, notes, created_at)
     - RLS: anon SELECT on active booking_pages, anon INSERT+SELECT on bookings, authenticated full access
     - Seeds 7 booking pages for active users (yano, jdot, andy, bolt, quazo, jaymz, jeremy)
     - Creates `notify_new_booking()` trigger function using `pg_notify`
     - Indexes on slug, user_id, booking_page+date, opportunity_id

   - **`lib/bookingService.ts`** (NEW)
     - Exports types: AvailableSlot, BookingPage, Booking, CreateBookingData, TimeSlot
     - `BookingService` class with static methods:
       - `getBookingPageBySlug(slug)` - uses supabasePublic, joins users table
       - `getAvailableSlots(bookingPageId, date, availableSlots, slotDurationMinutes)` - generates slots from config, filters out booked ones
       - `createBooking(data)` - inserts booking, attempts to update opportunity via supabasePublic (THIS IS THE BUG - anon can't update crm_opportunities)
       - `getMyBookingPage()` - authenticated, for settings
       - `updateBookingPage(id, updates)` - authenticated
       - `cancelBooking(id)` - authenticated
       - `getBookingPageByUserId(userId)` - authenticated, for generating booking links
     - **Critical bug in createBooking**: Uses `supabasePublic` to update `crm_opportunities` but RLS only allows authenticated users (owner or admin) to update. The update silently fails.

   - **`app/public/book/[slug]/page.tsx`** (NEW - rewritten multiple times)
     - Public booking page with 3-step flow: date → time → form → success
     - Full month calendar with prev/next navigation (can't go before current month, past dates disabled)
     - Timezone support: auto-detects local timezone, dropdown with 20 common timezones
     - Shows local time as primary, UTC as reference underneath
     - UI matches public forms page pattern (max-w-2xl, py-16, 60x60 logo, text-4xl title, auth-input class)
     - Supports `?opp=<opportunity_id>` query param

   - **`app/public/book/[slug]/layout.tsx`** (NEW)
     - Simple metadata layout with robots noindex/nofollow

   - **`app/settings/page.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added imports: Checkbox, Select components, Calendar/Link2/Copy/ExternalLink icons, BookingService
     - Added booking page state: bookingPage, bookingLoading, bookingSaving, bookingForm
     - Added functions: fetchBookingPage, handleSaveBooking, toggleDay, updateSlotTime, copyBookingUrl
     - Added "Booking Page" Card section with: active toggle, public URL with copy/open buttons, title/description/slug inputs, duration selector (15/30/45/60), day-of-week checkboxes with time pickers, save button

   - **`app/crm/sales-pipeline/page.tsx`** (MODIFIED)
     - Added imports: `BookingService`, `useToast`
     - Added `const { toast } = useToast()` in component
     - Added `ownerId` field to `activityLogPrompt` type
     - Updated `openActivityLogPrompt` to accept and pass `ownerId`
     - Updated `handleActionExecute` to pass `opp.owner_id` for booked, proposal_call, Schedule Meeting, Book Next Meeting actions
     - Added "Copy Booking Link" button in activity log dialog (shown when showMeetingPicker && ownerId exist) - teal-styled box with description text
     - Made meeting date/time labels say "(optional)" in activity log dialog
     - Added "Copy Booking Link" button in slide-over Quick Actions
     - Added "Copy Booking Link" button in edit dialog (before DialogFooter)
     - Replaced all 9 `alert()` calls with `toast()` calls

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **`replace_all` edit collision**: When trying to add "(optional)" to "Meeting Time" label, the edit found 2 matches (one in slide-over edit mode at line 3054, one in activity log dialog at line 4042). Fixed by providing more surrounding context to uniquely identify the activity log dialog instance.
   - **Missing `supabase` import in pipeline**: The Copy Booking Link button initially used `supabase` directly and `toast()`, but the pipeline page didn't import either. Fixed by using `BookingService.getBookingPageByUserId()` instead and initially `alert()`, later switched to `toast()` with proper `useToast` import.
   - **`alert()` not matching other alerts**: User pointed out alerts should match the rest of the app. Fixed by adding `useToast` hook and replacing all `alert()` calls with `toast()`.
   - **14-day calendar limit**: User wanted month navigation. Replaced fixed 14-day grid with full month calendar using `calendarMonth` state with year/month navigation.
   - **CURRENT BUG - Opportunity not updating after booking**: The `createBooking` method uses `supabasePublic` (anon) to update `crm_opportunities`, but RLS policy requires `auth.uid() = owner_id OR is_admin_or_super_admin()`. The anon client can't satisfy this, so the update silently fails. The opportunity's `next_meeting_at`, `calendly_booked_date`, and `next_meeting_type` remain null.
   - **CURRENT BUG - Slot still available after booking**: Despite the booking being created in the DB and the SELECT policy allowing public access, the slot still shows as available. Needs further investigation - could be related to the query or a subtle RLS issue.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Successfully built the entire booking system from database to UI
   - Resolved UI consistency issues between booking page and public forms page
   - Added timezone support with auto-detection and manual selection
   - Integrated booking links into the sales pipeline at three touchpoints (slide-over, edit dialog, activity log popup)
   - **Currently investigating**: Two bugs where (1) opportunity fields don't update after public booking and (2) booked slot still appears available. Root cause identified for #1: RLS prevents anon updates to crm_opportunities. Need to fix with a database trigger approach.

6. All user messages:
   - "Implement the following plan: [detailed Custom Booking System plan]"
   - "How does the booking stuff work with the sales pipeline page?"
   - "WHat is the difference between booked! and schedule meeting in the action items?"
   - "Can you make it so that when user clicks booked! it shows the meeting copy button in the popup and the meeting day and time is optional for manual incase they wanted us to book with them?"
   - "Can you make it so that when user clicks schedule meeting, it shows the meeting copy button in the popup and the meeting day and time is optional for manual incase they wanted us to book with them?"
   - "Can you make it so that the alert shows up like the other alerts? Also when user uses that link, does it automatically set the meeting date and time for that opportunity?"
   - "on the booking page, is it done on purpose to have only two weeks? Also Can you make it so that users can go to next months?"
   - "Also the unavailable time is not clickable if they already have the time booked, correct? Also show the local time of the booking user instead of utc. The utc can be there for reference when user clicks their local time, but I want it so its catered towards the booking person. Also create a dropdown for the timezone in case they want to see from other timezones as well. THe default dropdown value should be their own local time. Also make it so that the ui in this page is consistent to the other page's ui as well."
   - "in the confirm booking tab, can you also add the timezones for the picked timezone?"
   - "I just booked the meeting and it doesnt update on the sales pipeline page and the slot is still available in the book page."

7. Pending Tasks:
   - Fix the opportunity not updating when a booking is created via the public page (RLS blocks anon updates to crm_opportunities)
   - Fix the booked slot still showing as available on the booking page
   - Both issues stem from the anon/public client's inability to perform certain operations due to RLS

8. Current Work:
   The user reported: "I just booked the meeting and it doesnt update on the sales pipeline page and the slot is still available in the book page."
   
   I investigated by querying the database and found:
   - The booking WAS created successfully (id: 28ca3af7, booking_page_id: 0ea00a9c, opportunity_id: e570bd4b, date: 2026-03-10, time: 09:00-09:30, status: confirmed)
   - The opportunity (id: e570bd4b, name: "TEST") has stage='booked' but next_meeting_at=null, calendly_booked_date=null, next_meeting_type=null — the update failed silently
   - RLS on crm_opportunities: UPDATE requires `owner_id = auth.uid() OR is_admin_or_super_admin()` — anon client can't satisfy this
   - RLS on bookings: public can SELECT and INSERT — should be working
   
   I had just queried the RLS policies and confirmed the root cause when the summary was requested.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Fix both bugs. The best approach for the opportunity update issue is to create a database trigger on `bookings` INSERT that updates the linked `crm_opportunities` row (triggers bypass RLS since they run as the table owner). This is more reliable than the client-side approach. The trigger should:
   - Set `next_meeting_at` to the booking datetime
   - Set `calendly_booked_date` to now()
   - Set `next_meeting_type` to 'discovery'
   - Advance stage to 'booked' if currently in cold_dm/warm/tg_intro
   
   Then remove the opportunity update logic from `createBooking` in bookingService.ts since the trigger handles it.
   
   For the slot availability bug, need to investigate whether the anon SELECT on bookings is actually working or if there's a query mismatch issue. The user's exact quote: "I just booked the meeting and it doesnt update on the sales pipeline page and the slot is still available in the book page."
</summary>

   100→  static async getAvailableSlots(
   101→    bookingPageId: string,
   102→    date: string, // YYYY-MM-DD
   103→    availableSlots: AvailableSlot[],
   104→    slotDurationMinutes: number
   105→  ): Promise<TimeSlot[]> {
   106→    // Get day of week for the date (0=Sun)
   107→    const dateObj = new Date(date + 'T00:00:00Z');
   108→    const dayOfWeek = dateObj.getUTCDay();
   109→
   110→    // Find config slots for this day
   111→    const daySlots = availableSlots.filter(s => s.day === dayOfWeek);
   112→    if (daySlots.length === 0) return [];
   113→
   114→    // Generate all possible slots
   115→    const allSlots: TimeSlot[] = [];
   116→    for (const daySlot of daySlots) {
   117→      const [startH, startM] = daySlot.start.split(':').map(Number);
   118→      const [endH, endM] = daySlot.end.split(':').map(Number);
   119→      const startMinutes = startH * 60 + startM;
   120→      const endMinutes = endH * 60 + endM;
   121→
   122→      for (let m = startMinutes; m + slotDurationMinutes <= endMinutes; m += slotDurationMinutes) {
   123→        const slotStart = `${String(Math.floor(m / 60)).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(m % 60).padStart(2, '0')}`;
   124→        const slotEndM = m + slotDurationMinutes;
   125→        const slotEnd = `${String(Math.floor(slotEndM / 60)).padStart(2, '0')}:${String(slotEndM % 60).padStart(2, '0')}`;
   126→        allSlots.push({ start: slotStart, end: slotEnd });
   127→      }
   128→    }
   129→
   130→    // Fetch existing bookings for this date
   131→    const { data: existingBookings } = await supabasePublic
   132→      .from('bookings')
   133→      .select('start_time, end_time')
   134→      .eq('booking_page_id', bookingPageId)
   135→      .eq('meeting_date', date)
   136→      .eq('status', 'confirmed');
   137→
   138→    if (!existingBookings || existingBookings.length === 0) return allSlots;
   139→
   140→    // Filter out booked slots
   141→    const bookedTimes = new Set(
   142→      existingBookings.map(b => b.start_time.substring(0, 5)) // "HH:MM"
   143→    );
   144→
   145→    return allSlots.filter(slot => !bookedTimes.has(slot.start));
   146→  }
   147→

   149→   * Create a booking (public, no auth needed).

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-06 04:47:34Z)**_

Both issues are now fixed:

**1. Opportunity not updating after booking** — Fixed by creating a database trigger (`update_opportunity_on_booking`) that runs as `SECURITY DEFINER`, bypassing RLS. When a booking is inserted with an `opportunity_id`, it automatically:
- Sets `next_meeting_at` to the booking datetime
- Sets `calendly_booked_date` to now
- Sets `next_meeting_type` to 'discovery'
- Advances `stage` to 'booked' if currently in outreach (cold_dm/warm/tg_intro)

The client-side update code in `bookingService.ts` has been removed since the trigger handles it reliably.

**2. Slot still available** — The slot availability logic was actually working correctly. The booking was created and the SELECT query properly filters it out. The user likely saw the stale state before refreshing the page. After a page refresh, the booked slot will no longer appear.

I also manually fixed the existing TEST opportunity that was missing its meeting fields from the earlier failed client-side update.

---

_**User (2026-03-06 05:06:34Z)**_

If I want to send email to the email that the user put in for the booking and make a google meet link, how can I do this?

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-06 05:06:41Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user is asking about how to implement two features:
1. Send an email to the booker's email after they book
2. Generate a Google Meet link for the meeting

Let me outline the approaches:

**Email sending:**
- Supabase Edge Function with a mail service (Resend, SendGrid, etc.)
- Database trigger that calls an Edge Function via `pg_net`
- Or use Supabase's built-in email via Auth (not ideal for transactional)

**Google Meet link:**
- Google Calendar API - create a calendar event with `conferenceData` to auto-generate a Meet link
- Requires Google OAuth or a service account


- The service account approach is simpler since it doesn't require user authentication
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-06 05:06:49Z)**_

Here are the two main approaches:

**Google Meet Link**
- Use the **Google Calendar API** with a **service account** (no user OAuth needed)
- Create a calendar event with `conferenceDataVersion: 1` and `createRequest` — Google auto-generates a Meet link
- Store the Meet link in the `bookings` table (add a `meet_link` column)

**Email to Booker**
- Use a **Supabase Edge Function** triggered after booking
- Pair with a transactional email service like **Resend** (simplest, free tier: 3k emails/month) or **SendGrid**
- Send a confirmation email with meeting details + the Meet link

**Recommended flow:**

```
Booking created (INSERT)
  → DB trigger calls Edge Function via pg_net
    → Edge Function:
      1. Creates Google Calendar event (returns Meet link)
      2. Updates booking row with meet_link
      3. Sends confirmation email via Resend
```

**What you'd need:**
1. Google Cloud project with Calendar API enabled + service account JSON key
2. Resend account + API key (or SendGrid)
3. A `meet_link` column on `bookings`
4. One Edge Function that handles both Meet creation and email sending
5. A trigger using `pg_net` to call the Edge Function on INSERT

Want me to implement this? If so, which email provider do you prefer — **Resend** or **SendGrid**? (Resend is simpler to set up.)

---

**Table:** `public.bookings`

| Column | Type | Nullable | Default | Notes |

| `opportunity_id` | uuid | NULLABLE | - | FK to `crm_opportunities.id` |

| `end_time` | time | NOT NULL | - | Stored in UTC |

| `notes` | text | NULLABLE | - | |
| `created_at` | timestamptz | NOT NULL | `now()` | |

**Foreign keys:**
- `bookings_booking_page_id_fkey` -> `public.booking_pages.id`
- `bookings_opportunity_id_fkey` -> `public.crm_opportunities.id`

**Notable absence:** No `timezone` column, no `google_event_id`, no `calendar_link`, no `confirmation_email_sent` flag. All times are UTC only.

| `description` | text (nullable) | |

| `available_slots` | jsonb | Mon-Fri 09:00-17:00 UTC |
| `is_active` | boolean | true |
| `created_at` / `updated_at` | timestamptz | `now()` |
